reviews.text:
I couldn’t be more impressed with Jill Jester, Attorney at Law! From start to finish, she handled my case with the perfect balance of professionalism, compassion, and deep legal knowledge. Whether it’s civil matters, probate, real estate, or family law, Jill’s expertise truly stands out. She takes the time to explain every detail, communicates promptly, and fights for the best possible outcome.

Her dedication to her clients is unmatched — you can tell she genuinely cares. I highly recommend Jill Jester to anyone looking for an attorney who is both sharp in the courtroom and kind in person. A true 5-star experience all around! 🇺🇸

We consulted with Jill Jester about a real estate situation that we had no idea where to start. She was very knowledgeable and got us pointed in the right direction. I would definitely recommend her services to others.

Fantastic attorney.  She is currently working with us on a fiduciary case in Texas as we are in Indiana.  She has kept us well informed in the matter.  Met the deadlines by the courts when things needed to be addressed.  Texas law is completely different than here in Indiana and has helped us understand our options.  We appreciate her hard work.

I recently had the need to consult an attorney and had the VERY GOOD FORTUNE to be referred to Jill.  She was so helpful and kind.  ...and she went above and beyond to take great care of me!  I would highly recommend anyone seeking an attorney to contact Jill.
Great service for its members.
Rings and rings no help

Hi. I want to share my experiences with Shuster Law. To begin,  I was in a life position of hopelessness due to COVID. I was in financial ruin. I was in debt beyond the point of repair. I found the Shuster Law team from a flyer. Desperate for help, I called and made and appointment. I wasn’t so sure what to expect. My first consulting was great. I felt some relief but wasn’t quite sure how things would go. It was a battle of sacrifice on my part and professionalism and wisdom on bankruptcy laws of Mr.Shuster and his dynamic team. Everyone made me feel valued throughout my process. I am so thankful and grateful for all that was done for me from start to finish. I hope that reading this gives each and everyone reading this some hope. I had none. THE TEAM. THE BEST. THE ONE. Shuster Law🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥
Is an amazing law firm. Everyone was supportive and so helpful. FAMILY is all that needs to be said at this point. Have a great day everyone. The experience was worth it for me. Goodluck in any path you choose you can’t go wrong or be disappointed in my opinion   🙏🏽.

Thanks again Shuster Law. The entire team

Blessings to all❤️

Mr. D K Guinn

All she wanted was to close my case and get paid by the state which I’m technically responsible for.  Been calling to follow up on my case and she is not responding to my phone calls or text messages now I believe she blocked me. What a lawyer. Not only was she slow to reply to any communication but she just randomly dropped my case days before I was supposed to go to court for my kids. The charge was bogus and rather than accept the states offer she investigated and paid attention to details of the discovery. She is awesome! If ever I am in need of an attorney again,  heather will be my first call.  Thank you again heather for all of your awesome work!

Worst lawyer ever non professional in any means all she did was keep $2000 for nothing i hired her to represent my husband and she did nothing i hired another lawyer and my husband was out in 2 weeks and would not refund me any money not only that she would not answer calls and would take forever to return texts . During this covid 19 times she just stoled my money worst person ever.

Amanda Coffey is a professional and a lady! She is confident and aggressive and took excellent care of me in a situation that would’ve had me pulling out my hair from stress and frustration. Grace is a very well respected, tough lawyer that will fight for you and what you deserve. Grace was recommended to me by a friend/lawyer and I am very happy with the outcome.

Wood Weatherly managed my medical malpractice case in 2016. They are a professional dedicated group with a remarkable support staff. They kept me in the loop and were successful in an outcome that far exceeded my expectations. I have no reservations in recommending Wood Weatherly Trial Group.

They utilized a steady, practical approach during what can be an emotionally difficult time. I felt supported and well represented throughout my case, and I always had confidence that my interests were being handled carefully and competently. I would absolutely recommend them to anyone looking for a reliable, knowledgeable divorce attorney.

Not only did they get me what I expected to happen but exceeded my expectations. Only regret was not hiring them from the very beginning!!! The attorneys at Coffey & Yates have been through, professional and very attentive to my family’s needs during our case. I highly recommend Coffey & Yates for your family needs.

Coffey and Yates has been the BEST experience. The entire team has been there for me throughout the entire legal process. Kevin Hinzman withdrew from my case after I asked him to provide his highly questionable legal advice in writing. After I filed a bar complaint, Kevin Hinzman and Craig Flory retaliated by asking the prosecutor to do a State's motion for mental incompetency. Their misconduct delayed my case for months, and subjected me to an unnecessary and invasive examination.

Based on the totality of my interactions with this firm, I believe these attorneys engage in a pattern of colluding with prosecutors and preying upon vulnerable, mentally ill defendants through Denton County's indigent defense program.

I was assigned Kevin Hinzman as a court-appointed attorney in Denton County in March, 2025, for an Interference with Public Duties charge stemming from an incident where I was arrested after calling 911 for my mother's health emergency. After being restrained by 3 multiple officers, the arresting officer used a leg trip takedown and punched me repeatedly while I was restrained on the ground. He could be seen on body camera footage asking his colleague, "what should I charge him with?" after the arrest.

During an in-person consultation on March 25, Hinzman played some of this body camera footage and said "don't the police have a hard job?" Hinzman repeatedly asked if I would be willing to enter a guilty plea, but was not able to articulate how I had broken the relevant law. Specifically, he was unable to articulate how my actions- attempting to see my mother during a health emergency- satisfied the criteria for criminal negligence, the required mental state for my charge, which requires a "gross deviation" from a reasonable person's standard of care. He also brought up several potential conflicts of interest, such as his son entering a career in law enforcement, but never formally described them as such or asked me to sign any waiver.

When I asked Hinzman to put his questionable legal advice in writing, he immediately withdrew from my case citing "conflicts" and "veiled threats to [his] professional responsibility." (PIC-1) When pressed on how exactly requesting his legal position in writing was a "veiled threat," Hinzman did not answer. (PIC-2)

On April 8, I filed a grievance with the State Bar of Texas regarding this conduct. (PIC-3) I was especially concerned that Hinzman informed me that he represented "a lot of mentally ill" defendants through the County's indigent defense program. Given the unscrupulous practices I had experienced- immediately pressuring me to enter a guilty plea, refusing to put legal positions in writing- I was concerned that vulnerable defendants would be preyed upon.

On July 28, 2025, the prosecutor assigned to my case, Cecilia Weigel, raised the issue of mental competency to stand trial during a status hearing. She said, "I've spoken to Craig Flory and Kevin Hinzman, who were his previous attorneys, and they have urged me to do a State's motion for competency" (PIC-4). At this point, I had not spoken with Hinzman or Flory in nearly 4 months. The last communication was on April 1, where we communicated regarding my request for my case file. The only notes from the case file which Hinzman described as containing "everything in your physical file as well as our digital file" (PIC-5) did not mention any concerns related to mental competency. In fact, the only mention of mental health issues was "Clean, no alcohol or drugs" (PIC-6).

In other words, there was no documented concern regarding incompetency, and no contact between myself and Hinzman for 4 months. In apparent retaliation for my bar complaint, Hinzman and Flory asked the prosecutor to raise the issue of mental incompetency to stand trial in my case- forcing me to endure an invasive and unnecessary examination, and stalling my case for months.

On December 29, 2025, I wrote to Hinzman, attaching an excerpt of the court transcript and asking him to confirm if he had asked the prosecutor to raise the issue of competency. I have not received any reply. If I do receive a reply, I will update the review.

Be extremely wary of these individuals.

Kevin Hinzman was my attorney and he made everything so so easy. I’ve worked with multiple attorneys for different reasons and he’s been the best. He looked for every way of helping and got me the best deal, also explained everything thoroughly. 10/10 recommend.

I highly recommend Brandon Reese of Texas Grizzly Law Firm. He is exactly as advertised—personable, confident, and a powerful advocate in court. His courtroom presence, especially before a jury, stands out. He presents facts clearly, fights hard for a father’s rights, and effectively challenges unsupported allegations. My case is still ongoing, but based on the advocacy, communications I’ve experienced so far, I’m hopeful for a positive outcome and would confidently recommend Brandon Reese and Texas Grizzly Law Firm.

Seth Fuller, he’s family to us now, we love him!

Thanks to Seth’s passion for the law, his client and his ethics, Seth was able to uncover the many mistakes the police department and district attorney made that led to my son being mistakenly charged for a crime. Seth’s work is the only reason my son was able to come home to his family.

Their mistakes could’ve cost our son 2 years or more of his life. 2 years he would never get back, be charged with a crime he did not commit and a record for life.

It was amazingly beautiful to watch him in the court room.

We are forever grateful to Seth and Grizzly Law Firm! Our children are worth more than how our judicial system handles them, never stop fighting for our children. Do yourself a favor and call Seth, he’s worth it, just like your child is.

Mr. Reese helped me through my divorce and custody case, and I couldn’t have asked for someone better to represent me and my daughter. He was thorough, answered the million questions I had every step of the way, and made sure my daughter’s best interest was top priority in court.

Seth Fuller and his office do not do anything without constant pushing .  They never communicate or callback.  Less than subpar legal representation.   He takes full advantage of his client being incarcerated and not having the ability to communicate.   The office never responds  he does bare minimum requirements by court.  DO NOT HIRE HIM!
I am a parent of his client.  He doesn't communicate with his clients at all.  His response is typical brush off.  After telling Seth what his client is being told he denies all responsibility and says he will only speak to "his client"  whom he has visited once in jail and has zero contact in months.  Ms Fitzgerald is a jail advocate not an employee of Fuller.  Wow
reviews.ownerResponse: You are not a client of ours and never have been. Further, we are not allowed to discuss our client's case with anyone but our client.

reviews.text:
My review is long overdue. I hired Brandon as my attorney when he first opened his practice, and I truly could not be happier with that decision. From the very beginning, he was straightforward, honest, and never sugarcoated anything, which I appreciated more than I can say.

My custody case was far from easy, but Brandon was on top of everything, always advocating fiercely for me and my kids at every turn. His communication, preparation, and follow-through were solid throughout the entire process.

And now, well over a year after our case wrapped up, he still takes my calls and answers all my “stupid” questions with no hesitation or judgment. That kind of ongoing support is rare!

I couldn’t have asked for a better attorney during one of the hardest times of my family’s life. I’ll always be grateful and I’ll always recommend this firm.

I would give 10 ⭐ if possible! Seth Fuller is an absolutely amazing lawyer and I highly recommend hiring him. He went above and beyond to help me with my criminal case and I couldn't be more grateful! Out of all the lawyers I've had over the years Seth is by far the absolute BEST! You will not regret hiring him!

After reading some of the reviews I’m actually quite fine with the fact that I couldn’t retain Biggs Law as an attorney, so let’s start with the receptionist Kathy, I first reached out February 1st, I explained the urgency in my situation and left all possible contact information and I was told Mr. Biggs would reach out to me as soon as possible, days go by and I call again because no one has reached out and once again he was not available nor did he return any calls, during the month of February alone I inquired a total of 3 times and from there I left it alone until a few days ago I decided to try again as my court date was quickly approaching, I was informed that he was pretty busy and out of town but was referred to another lawyer named Tricia Perry who doesn’t answer the phone … at all. Kathy told me to give Tricia a call and if I could not reach her to reach back out to see what she could possibly do to help, I took her advice and did just that but when I called back she acted as if she didn’t say a thing and basically told me to keep trying the non working number to the other attorney. Needless to say it’s been months and I never heard Mr. Biggs voice once and he never took the time out to even consult with me after I was referred to him through the Texas Bar Association, if you have no interest in taking new clients on you should remove yourself from the registry. I understand his case load is probably pretty heavy but if your receptionist is saying one thing and you’re doing another then it’s obvious there may be some issues within in regards to communication. It almost seemed pretty dismissive as if they didn’t need or want my business. I have no record and definitely not a rude, mean or malicious person I found myself in a bit of trouble and just wanted to go over my options, my advice to you is that if you have a pressing legal matter and you’re looking for someone personable and dependable you should probably read these reviews and then after that, keep scrolling and find you somebody else 🤷🏽‍♀️

reviews.text: I have been to numerous attorneys in and around Denton, Texas, for the last 6 years. Intimately acquainted with at least seven. Associated with fourteen if I include all of them.  Some of them were supposed "super lawyers" and most have been practicing law for well over 10 years. Mr. Biggs is the ONLY attorney that actually has been helpful, courteous, and treated my legal needs with respect. He gives liberally of his time, and in comparison with the other attorneys, his fees are very reasonable; you get something for your money unlike others I have been to. He also is  empathetic and caring. I also like the fact that his office is no frills and low overhead. More can be given to his clients needs legally and financially than to some penthouse office space and gilded gold furniture. January 2020 (right before Covid shut everything down) we retained Ms. Tress to handle 2 very serious felony charges against my husband. Ms. Tress was great to work with and I am sure she got frustrated with my husband (and probably me as well) with asking questions, sometimes more that once because we didn't understand why certain things did or did not happen and why the case made it as far as it had and why it was taking so long to either get it dismissed or to trial to get it over with so that we could try to get on with our life and not have to stress about it because when we retained Ms. Tress, our issue before my husband's arrest started in 2018. My husband told Ms. Tress from the start that we would have to go to trial if the DA doesn't drop or dismiss the charges because he would never take a plea offer because he is innocent and by taking a plea, he would be admitting guilt to something he did not do. Long story short, almost 3 years after my husband's arrest and the stress, anxiety, worrying, and plenty of tears and getting ready for trial that was to being this week, Ms. Tress called us last Thursday and informed us that the DA is dismissing the case. THANK YOU MS. TRESS for being patient with my husband and I. I am sure we were probably hard to deal with at times and not understanding some things and questioning things and you probably questioned why you took our case but we are so thankful for all that you have done and so grateful that we got the results we wanted even though it really isn't over until we clear his record but again. Thank you and for anyone reading this, you will not be disappointed as Ms. Tress is knowledgeable, patient and will do all she can to get the best results for your situation.

Ok so everyone has a story right? Well here’s my personal experience with this Law Firm. After many years of fighting I was at the point that I wanted to go burn down the house of the people responsible for my disability and at times even felt like a foreigner. Countless of times I was shot down the ALJ denied me and the appeals council did as well within the same day I felt so lost and the other Law Firm stated..Oscar we are dropping you as our client but we wanted to refer you to this law firm if you would like to file a civil suit in federal court….
I was feeling lower than low like all sacrifices my family had made went to nothing I was nothing…Then Mandee contacts me and I swear she was all happy and energetic and her vibe was just a breath of fresh air and shes like…Hey we’re gonna be alright this is what we do…fast forward to 12/20/2024 I see this and im not familiar with none of these court words and what not but I researched enough to know that not only did we WIN but Chermol & Fishman LLc also filed a motion where the US Government has to pay the burden and admits of wrong doing….

Do you know what that feeling is like?? It’s a happy nervous laugh like oh wow Guys thank you for helping me WIN but I would have been ok with paying you guys out of my earnings..
They’re like no thats your money and then they thank me for choosing them….IM STILL IN SHOCK! Lost for words….what I can say is my self respect is at an all time high…actually come and think of it I have never experienced a WIN like this or something like this….you know when they said they will fight for me I just though that was something they threw around BUT they be more upset about your case than you are to the point your gonna make the US Government Pay for the Burden?? Like hold on wait wait you do know that im Mexican right? I don’t wanna get shot showing out like this 😂…You’re a human being! 🥹 this law firm had me believing I could stand up to my wife! 💀

Thank you Mandee, Sandy, and Ashi for all your hard work and believing in me…but most of all thank you Chermol & Fishman!

My wife and I experienced an unbelievably terrible contractor experience and we had no choice but to terminate the contractor. Although the contractor was paid for work completed they chose to place a lien on our property for more than three times the amount of the original contract and  we had virtually little recourse or so we thought. We consulted with one attorney who gladly collected our money but gave us no recommendations or solutions to our situation. After considerable research my wife came across Kelly Davis & Associates who had a considerable amount of experience in liens and fraudulent liens. We schedule a visit and met with one of the associates and knew right away we were at the right place! The probing questions with intelligence and expertise gave us immediate sense of relief. Our associate sent an exceptional demand letter citing the many flaws with their lien to the contractor requesting the lien be removed within 5 business. Needless to say, it was removed within 5 business days and we can now have peace back into our lives. I have to say that I have never had a situation like this and Kelly Davis & Associates truly provided us a legal solution and alleviated the months of anguish that we had experienced.

I cannot thank them enough for what they have done for me and my wife!!

reviews.text: When our firm refers cases to other lawyers, especially cases involving sexual assault, we are extremely picky. We want to ensure that the potential clients we refer out are 1) paid attention to; 2) treated with respect; and 3) represented by attorneys that will vigorously pursue justice. Zeke and his team check all 3. You will be well represented and taken care of at this firm.

Zeke and Tahira are incredibly caring, sensitive, and helpful. Their transparency and professionalism stood out, making a difficult situation much easier to navigate. As someone who had never dealt with this type of legal matter before, I didn’t know what to expect, but I had no issues at all and felt safe trusting them with my experience. I highly recommend this firm to anyone who unfortunately finds themselves in need of their services.

Subpar Representation Accompanied by False Promises

To the overly confident attorneys: it’s one thing to under-promise and over-deliver, but quite another to over-promise and under-deliver. Disappointing doesn’t even begin to describe it. Our case, handled by Underwood Law Offices and the Fortenberry Firm, was an utterly exasperating. I’m not someone driven by greed; I wasn’t seeking a tremendous amount of money, only to be restored to the financial position I was in before the incident.

This so-called “million-dollar lawsuit” took nearly four years to settle, only for us to walk away with $1,600—hardly enough to cover the $5,000 we paid in deductibles. Throughout the ordeal, we were repeatedly assured, “We’ve got a strong case, excellent evidence, and we’re going to make you whole.” Reality proved otherwise. The evidence was so weak it couldn’t even persuade the jury during mock trials.

Had they been upfront from the start, I could have saved myself nearly four years of frustration and false hope. Honesty from the outset would have been far preferable to this disappointing charade.

Edit Post Reply:

While you never promised a specific amount of money, it was consistently reiterated throughout our case that we would be made whole again. You just stated that our recovery would be based on the amount of losses we could prove, and I went above and beyond to provide that proof. I submitted extensive documentation, including losses for three vehicles—totalling $3,000 in deductibles—our $2,000 renters’ deductible, paid medical bills and statements showing out-of-pocket expenses, and documentation for lost wages. Yet, the settlement of $4,700 doesn’t even begin to cover the $5,000 in deductibles, let alone the unreimbursed losses for our vehicles that had negative equity and no GAP coverage, our home, and the wages we couldn’t recover.

My frustration lies with the disparity between the expectations you set and the outcome delivered. If you had been upfront and said, ‘Every medical record submitted incurs a fee that will come out of your settlement,’ I wouldn’t have submitted over 50 documents to bolster our case when it clearly made no difference. If you had told me, ‘We can’t recover lost wages,’ I would have adjusted my expectations accordingly. And if you had been transparent enough to admit, ‘We can’t make you whole again,’ I would have faced my losses years ago instead of spending nearly four years hoping to recover them.

It’s not the money, it’s the false expectations and over confidence which resulted in both firms underperforming.
reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry you are disappointed in the case, you we never promised you any amount of money.  Your recovery was based on the amount of losses you were able to prove.  We drastically reduced our attorney fees and case expenses to help give you more money in your pocket.  Ultimately it was your decision to settle the case.  If you want to discuss the case further, please call our office 469-626-7373.

reviews.text:
Update: I am changing my review from 5 stars to 1 star. I did not write the original 5-star review it was written by the attorney during a billed appointment. After reviewing our billing and overall experience, I can no longer recommend this firm.

We regret hiring this firm a second time, assuming it would be easier given our prior case. Instead, it felt like they consistently milked the clock, often labeling charges as “research.”

I strongly recommend shopping around and comparing fees. There are other attorney offices that will do the same work for far less. Based on our experience, I do not recommend hiring this firm.

I like working with this law firm. I am working with them again because they are very helpful. They take care of you and are on top of everything. I have been working with Anamika and am very happy. Rosie is always there to help us with everything and returns our call every time.
Very satisfied experience here
I am very happy working with they Law firm and Anamika regarding my legal matters
Great law firm. I have been very happy working with Anamika. Highly recommend them.
Experience is really great Mathur law firm.. took care of paperwork in a timely manner and answered all my queries.
Ms. Anamika has been very helpful. She has kept me informed. Very happy with her services.
I am very happy with the law firm and my attorney Anamika. Highly recommend the staff and law firm.
Great place, hard working staff and very goal oriented.  The diligence is outstanding and the fees while not inexpensive are certainly justified.
It's frustrating. I've had a case with this law firm, Collier Law, since 2024, and to this day they haven't kept me updated on my case. I'm calling, but I'm not getting any answers.
Highly recommend calling this firm after an auto accident.

I have used this law firm to represent me before with no issues but this time I have serious issues. Half way through my case, they dropped me as a client without reason. I found out I no longer had a lawyer through a 3rd party. They didn't even tell me themselves. When I called to question the reason and get information, I was hung up on multiple times.
SYLVIA was the paralegal assigned to my case. She would promise me she would send me important documents that I had requested and then not ever send me them. I waited 2 weeks for the police report she said she would send and I never got it. I had to drive an hour away to get it myself when she could have just hit send. When I texted the number given by SYLVIA to send and receive info about the case, I asked important questions about my medical and appointments and was literally ghosted. I have the text thread proof of her literally ignoring important messages.
Now after all that, they still refuse to be professional, picking up the phone and hanging it up as soon as we speak, every time we call. They refuse to give us the case number that our new lawyer needs from them and they won't act like adults for long enough for us get anything done. It is absolutely the most unprofessional I have ever heard of a LAW FIRM being. DO NOT USE COLLIER LAW FOR ANY REASON. Trust the reviewers because there is a reason for how terribly reviewed they are. EXTREMELY UNPROFESSIONAL.

They refused to communicate properly, when I shared my frustrations about it they dropped the case and when I tried calling back to get information about what's going on they just hung up on me like a child would, after I said I was going to get another lawyer they won't give me my case number or police report when I asked they just hung up on me.. there's a very clear reason this place has such low reviews, I would stay clear at all cost. I understand not wanting to want to work with someone but to be completely unprofessional is a wild thing to do.
Great personal injury attorney.

I had the privilege of working with Andrew Passons as my mediator, and I’m incredibly grateful for his professionalism and steady guidance. Going into divorce mediation, I wasn’t sure what to expect and had a lot of built up fear and anxiety about the process. Andrew immediately created a calm, respectful environment that helped put me at ease.

He was patient, thoughtful, and fair throughout the entire day, helping both sides stay focused and productive during a very emotional situation. His approach made a difficult process feel manageable and ultimately helped us reach a resolution.

I would highly recommend Andrew to anyone looking for a skilled, compassionate mediator during a challenging time.  Yesterday was one of the hardest and saddest days of my life, but Andrew did a great job of making it suck just a little bit less and I am truly grateful for his help.

"Five stars for Andrew Passons and his incredible staff! They helped me through a very complex divorce and truly went above and beyond my expectations. Their professionalism, clear communication, and dedication to my case made all the difference I am so grateful for their hard work and highly recommend their firm."

I hired Mr. Passons and his team to represent my divorce case. Mr. Passons is very experienced and board certified in family law. He laid out all the options on the table and gave a clear and concise answer to all of my legal questions. His paralegal Christina is very knowledgeable and thorough as well. Mr. Passons guided me through the entire process and I truly couldn't have done it without his guidance and representation.
Melanie Hogan handled our adoption case and we are very pleased with her performance as our attorney. She explained the processes very well and everything went smoothly.

I am very grateful for the excellent legal representation I received from Sarah Darnell and the team at Lewis, Passons & Darnell, P.C.
They were professional, honest, and guided me through every step of the divorce process with patience and clarity.
I always felt that their priority was to protect me legally in the best possible way.
I deeply respect their work and highly recommend them to anyone in need of trustworthy and compassionate legal counsel.

I cannot say enough good things about this firm! They were very thorough and kept me informed about every step of the process. They make you feel comfortable and at ease the entire time. They take your case very seriously and work hard to get the job done! I highly recommend their services!!!

Thank you Sarah for all of your help and making sure I was successful. It was a pleasure for me because you're easy to work with, I never felt treaded on. I will refer you if I get the chance and I wish you the best.
Top notch group. I don't recommend divorce, in the event of you won't be disappointed with this group.

As soon as Andrew walked into the meeting, I had a bad feeling about him. He does not seem to like women. He continually interrupted me and made assumptions about me. He was rude and did not actually LISTEN to anything I was saying. I told him several times, "You don't know me." as he was assuming I was wanting to take my wealthy husband to the cleaners and I did not. I do not recommend him to anyone, especially women. If you are a male, it might be different. I did not feel like I could trust Andrew Passons at all. My husband's lawyer talked my husband into getting a protective order against me, which was completely fabricated and dropped before the court date even happened. I'm not sure if this was the reason for his poor attitude or if this is just the way he is. There are plenty of other lawyers in Denton.
Andrew is top notch. I would recommend him to anyone who needs a family lawyer.

Andrew Passons was incredible in handling all aspects of my divorce. He has a high level of integrity and fairness which are very important to me. Even with my high conflict divorce, he made sure to keep me informed through the entire process. I would highly recommend him and his team. They were very professional and highly knowledgeable in many areas.
Highly recommend

No one wants to go through a divorce, but when you must, it is good to have a skilled lawyer on your side. Mark Lewis worked skillfully and with integrity at every turn to help me navigate the complex legal process of divorce. His eye was always to the law and the details of the process that would help me avoid additional problems or complications in the future. I really have found Mark and all of his staff very easy to work with. I would recommend him over and over again.

Mark Lewis is the most honorable, thorough, wise, and honest attorney I have ever worked with.  Mark and his whole team handled our case with the utmost professionalism and sensitivity.  I would strongly recommend this firm to anyone.  Any separation/divorce/custody situation is difficult.  Knowing that you've hired the best legal team in the area can make a difficult situation so much more bearable, and provide peace of mind.

Andrew is simply the best.  He was very sensitive and understanding to my situation, helped me to clearly define my goals and successfully fought for them.  He always advised me well of realistic expectations.  Andrew and his team worked quickly and efficiently.  I would recommend Andrew to everyone.

I never questioned my decision to chose Andrew to represent me. I had a long, difficult case, nothing standard or easy. Andrew and Jessica really took time to learn about my family and I and really worked for what was best for everyone. He managed my expectations, so I knew if what I wanted was realistic or not. There were no surprises- because he thinks of everything! Jessica his paralegal is a God send! There were many times talking to her for a few minutes got me through the day. Andrew and Jessica make an amazing team, they are in sync and when you watch them prepare for meetings or have conversations they can almost do it without speaking :) There are no words to ever accurately describe the love I have for them, and how much their time, energy and effort meant to me. Yes we pay lawyers for their time, energy and effort, but you can tell the money had nothing to do with their level of care. I honestly feel like I made 2 friends with Andrew and Jessica. Choosing Andrew to help my family though my divorce was the best decision I could have made.

Divorce is a painful experience but my legal team specifically Nicole Carroll and her paralegal Allison Martin helped me navigate the family laws and carried me through the divorce process. Both Nicole and Allison were responsive, compassionate, and very professional. They helped me through this difficult time in my life.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your thoughtful review. We're so glad Nicole and Allison could support you with compassion and professionalism during such a difficult time. Wishing you all the best as you move forward.

reviews.text: Nicole and the Varghese Summersett team were great, very polite, professional, and knowledgeable. I will be using them again for any potential family law needs. Thanks guys!

The most compassionate and willing to listen, understand the details and provide real consultation in a time of life that’s really hard. I was so pleased with the communication, the way they treated me, and the team. Highly recommend!
Nicole and Allison are the very best! They are responsive and patient with all of my questions!

I’ve been very pleased with Nicole Carroll and Allison Martin. I’ve worked with a few attorneys in the past 14 years and the biggest issue is getting someone to respond to you whether that’s returning a phone call or an email. Every attorney I have worked with besides Nicole has been absolutely horrible about returning calls/emails. Weeks and even months would go by without a return call or email. Nicole and her team were very responsive. They either responded the same day or the next. I was also very pleased with the outcome of my case. Nicole clued into certain details of my case that made the difference for our success. I will definitely use her services again should I ever need another attorney.
Nicole was very professional and easy going. She made the mediation process much smoother.  If you ever need these types of services 10 out of 10 would recommend.
Nicole settled a tough case that initially appeared to be headed straight for trial.  She was fantastic and I would definitely use her again.

Nicole and Allison handled my custody case. Nicole was very upfront about everything throughout the process, she was well versed in what to expect and helped me understand the legal terms and norms. Allison was very thorough with our documents and was always very quick to respond to my emails. I am glad we chose them to represent us and help us get through the case with minimal court time.

Nicole and Allison handled a couple of issues for me and my family. I could not have chosen better representation.

Nicole shoots straight and tells it like it is, but with tact and professionalism. She sets reasonable expectations and cannot be exceeded in the knowledge of how all of this mess works. She truly cares and it shows. Both Nicole and Allison kept us informed about every little thing going on. It can be a long process and a lot of down time in between things, but they would text, call or email just to check on us and see how we were doing.

If you choose anyone else to represent you, you're doing it wrong.

I had a few questions about my divorce decree. I spoke to Julie, informed her of my situation. She said she would discuss it with an attorney & call me back. Mr. McMullen informed me the firm couldn’t help me but gave me a few suggestions. Thank you Julie & Mr. McMullen for your time, kindness & honesty. Julie was very pleasant to talk to. She took her time & never rushed me off the phone. I appreciate her & the firm. Susie

I’ve had the pleasure of working with Laura Richardson & Alex while navigating a complex case! They were able to help me move my case to Texas from out of state, and worked with me on getting the other party (who is in different state than the original case + Texas) to update our paperwork. They were very helpful, extremely communicative and detail oriented.  They made sure myself and my kiddos got everything we needed on our case. 10/10 would absolutely work with them again in the future! They made such a headache of a process so smooth and easy, forever grateful for their support.

The legal team of Varghese Summersett, are the most prompt, professional and diligent group of people I think I have ever met. Their methods of communication, and attention to detail are 2nd to none, I was always well aware of what was going on regarding my situation and if ever I needed a question answered they answered thoroughly and with clarity.  You can tell that they hold themselves accountable to a standard that soars above the rest. I highly recommend them for anyone in need of their services!

Simply Masterful!

Navigating your way through the challenges of family law can be extremely stressful and will certainly test your resolve. Choosing the right lawyer with a solid team behind them is so critical.

Nicole Carroll and Allison Martin listened to my needs, understood my situation and what I was trying to accomplish for my family. This is the second time Nicole Carroll has represented me and both times she has gone above and beyond with her professionalism and integrity. She is extremely efficient with time-management and truly cares about you as a client. It wasn’t until my hearing that I realized, how much work goes into being prepared and presenting the case. I was so impressed with every aspect of the way they handled my case, and I highly recommend them.

Nicole was great to work with.  She listened to my goals, understood my family’s needs, was a strong advance for me,  gave great advice and considerations, and ultimately allowed me to move successfully through the process.
Nicole goes above and beyond with her professionalism and integrity.  She is efficient with time-management and truly cares about the outcome for her clients and their families.  Highly recommend.

Nicole Carroll is a treasure.  I am a retired judge and have seen first-hand how well she prepares a client and how she professionally conducts herself in the courtroom.  She is a credit to the family law bar.

Nicole Carroll was opposing counsel on a case. We were able to work out an agreement that was mutually beneficial to our clients. She was a great advocate for her client while remaining professional in our dealings with each other.

I had a great experience with Varqhese Summersett I left a message for Julie and before she called me back she had all my information and had done research on my case. She went above and beyond to make sure they could help me with my situation. Some law office will charge you to tell you they can't help you she really did her research and a gave me best direction and I walked away knowing I would call them anytime if I was in need of a lawyer.
Nicole is the best around! I refer all my friends to her.  Efficient with time, helped me during the most difficult times and happy with the results.   Thank you, Nicole!

Turner and his amazing team are absolutely the best of the best. I had a custody situation that was made complicated by circumstances beyond our control. To have a team of people supporting me not only legally but emotionally meant the world. They made an extremely tough situation manageable by listening and caring. Not to mention they have the patience of a saint!!! I truly would recommend them to anyone and everyone. Words don’t do them justice!!

As a client of Nicole Carroll & Allison Martin, I have been extremely impressed. They are both terrific at making you feel important as a client, which has made all the difference on my journey through family law. The time they’ve put in on my case & the strategies they’ve employed have helped me to feel more confident going through each step in this process. I highly recommend working with them, should you find yourself in need of family law assistance!

Divorce is a nasty thing sometimes. I needed an attorney who would stand up for me and Wade did just that. He helped me understand the legalities of my case. Explained the legal process and got me through a very nasty, lengthy divorce. I highly recommend him and his team!
I have been well pleased with the services I have received. I would recommend the law firm for any needs necessary.
Laura was the BEST! She made the experience so easy and was incredibly helpful throughout the entire process. So thankful I picked this law firm to represent me!
Amanda really is the best at what she does!! We will continue to follow her anywhere she goes ♥️ she’s provided such useful and appreciated services!

I cannot recommend Nathan Miller highly enough. From the very beginning, he handled my case with professionalism, clarity, and genuine care. He took the time to explain every step of the process, answered my questions thoroughly, and made sure I understood exactly what to expect. His knowledge of the law and attention to detail gave me a great deal of confidence during what could have been a very stressful time.

What stood out most to me was his responsiveness and the way he treated me with respect throughout the entire process. He approached my situation thoughtfully and strategically, and the outcome reflected his diligence and expertise.

I also want to specifically recognize his paralegal, Alyssa. She is absolutely wonderful, organized, communicative, and incredibly kind. She kept everything moving smoothly and was always quick to respond whenever I needed assistance. Having someone that reliable and professional on the team makes a huge difference.

If you’re looking for an attorney who is knowledgeable, responsive, and truly invested in his clients, Nathan Miller and his team are outstanding.

I am extremely grateful for Mr. Miller and his team. From the start, Mr. Miller was professional, insightful, and genuine about my situation. Thanks to his hard work and attention to detail, my charge was reduced. I am so thankful for his commitment and support through a very difficult time, and I could not recommend him and his team more highly.

Nathan and his team were incredible from start to finish. From the very first call, he was responsive, clear, and made sure I understood every step of the process. He guided me through what I needed to do, stayed in touch with regular updates, and followed through exactly as he said he would.

Thanks to his work, my case was dismissed, and now he’s helping me with getting the record cleared so I can fully move forward. Nathan is not only highly skilled but also genuinely cares about his clients — I always felt like I was in good hands.

I can’t recommend Nathan Miller and his office enough if you want someone who is professional, trustworthy, and committed to getting you the best outcome possible.

THANK YOU Mr. Miller, and to all of your staff. Rebeca, and Alyssa. The level of professionalism is what to expect from such a respectful, honest, and REAL “attorney”. If you don’t want to read my whole review? HIGHLY RECOMMEND…

Not only that Mr. Miller was completely honest with me. He was not going to represent me. Even without me paying any consultation fees... believe it or not! But still, he listened to my entire story. Asked the right questions. With all of that being said... He was completely honest and transparent about the legal system in the city/county. Gladly he took my case. Stood like a solid soldier behind me. Defended me with all his strong tools and skills. He is so smart, confident yet humble human being. For the first time in the history of Denton County Mr. Miller broke the record on getting me, as his client, off probation in less than a year. If anyone can do it? It would be you Nathan.

The fees were well worth every penny. In today’s world in 2025. It’s so rare to find a real true attorney who has dignity and stands behind his clients. Not just there to take your money. I had such a pleasure knowing and working with you Nathan.

Respectfully,
Thamer Gazzaz

I was arrested for a DWI in August of 2024 in the city of Flower Mound Dento, TX and researched for good DWI lawyers and the name which kept coming up was Nathan Miller. He had successfully won a number of cases. I contacted Mr Miller and he agreed to take my case on. He outlined the process very clearly and he immediately got to work. He got copies of the arrest and he told me he was confident in achieving a result. Throughout the process he was always available and would call back if he wasn't. In July of this year (2025) he called to inform me that the DA  had dropped the case. I am sure in my mind that Mr Miller had all to do with that. As a former prosecutor he knows all the machinations of the criminal process. I personally cannot thank him enough and would highly recommen̈d to anyone if they need a great layer, he's your man. He will tell you right up front if you stand a chance of having the case dropped but if not, I would not want anyone else in my corner fighting for me!

My juvenile son got in some trouble at school. We hired Mr. Miller for his case and are very happy with the outcome of defered probation. We highly recommend Mr. Miller and his staff for any legal assistance.

From the outset, I approached this venture with faith, seeking guidance through prayer. My search led me to Mr. Miller's office, and I was impressed when he personally reached out via text.

Our initial conversation instilled confidence and reassurance, as I sensed genuine concern and expertise. Meeting him just hours later, I was amazed by his thorough preparation – he had already compiled a comprehensive notepad with all relevant information.

Mr. Miller's dedication and professionalism left a lasting impression.

I'm extremely happy with the services provided by The Law Offices of Nathan Miller, PLLC
My experience with Nathan Miller & team was excellent (special kudos to Alyssa). I'm pleased with the service provided to me from Law Offices of Nathan Miller. Will recommend to friends and family who looking for a great lawyer.
You guys are the very best....... thank you.

I am incredibly grateful for the outstanding support and expertise provided by Nathan Miller in handling my case. From the very beginning, he was professional, understanding, and exceptionally knowledgeable about the legal process.

Throughout the process, Nathan Miller was responsive, honest,
and always kept me informed about the next steps. I felt supported and confident knowing I had a strong advocate by my side.
I highly recommend Nathan Miller, He truly goes above and beyond for clients and delivers results.
Nathan was amazing. Couldn’t ask for things to go any better

Hands down the best attorney I have ever had. He went above and beyond for me and I cannot thank him enough. He did everything he said he would and then some. He also has an amazing staff behind him. If you’re looking for a good attorney, look no more, Nathan is the best.

I could be happy to write a recommendation for Nathan and his team. Alyssa gets a special shout out. I've never needed legal services and wasn't sure who to trust. I had anxiety through most of the process because I wasn't sure if I was in good hands or not. So if this review does anything I hope it eases that anxiety for other. Trust in Nathan. Know that if you follow his recommendations your chances of having a good outcome are high.

I highly recommend Nathan Miller without reservation. I am pleased with the level of service and professionalism provided. His expertise and attention to detail is great and truly made a difference.

Also want to thank Alyssa for being a phenomenal person and addressing and concerns I had.

I can't say enough about Nathan Miller. Not only is he an incredible lawyer, but he's also a truly remarkable person. Over the years, Nathan has helped me navigate some of the toughest situations I've put myself in, and the outcomes he's achieved for me have been nothing short of fantastic. His expertise and dedication made all the difference, and I'm beyond grateful for the support he's shown me.
As a young man, Nathan has been someone I look up to, both professionally and personally. His guidance has shaped me into the man I am today, and I would not be where I am without him.
I also want to give a huge shoutout to Rebecca, Nathan's assistant. She is absolutely wonderful-so patient, kind, and always going above and beyond. She doesn't just ask about me; she genuinely cares about my family. Her warmth and attention to detail make the whole experience even better.
If you're looking for someone who genuinely cares about his clients and delivers real results, Nathan Miller and his team are the ones you want in your corner. Highly recommended!

I have had the pleasure with working with Mr. Miller and his staff on several occasions, this one being the worst for me considering I was facing felony charges.

From the beginning with calling his office in straight panic mode and anxiety thru the roof Ms. Rebecca his office manager made me feel at ease with her kindness and patience. Lord knows I was a “Total Mess” let me tell you and I’m sure I got on her nerves with as much as I called her to chat, but there wasn’t 1 time where she ever made me feel like a nuisance or a burden!
Thank you Rebecca😍💛

Meeting Mr. Miller was a blessing to say the least. He wasn’t like all the rest of these attorneys around here that doesn’t listen to you or simply wanting to take all your money. The fact that he took the time out to actually ask questions about ME as an individual and my circumstances let me know then and there that He was DIFFERENT and he CARED!!!  No other attorney I dealt with uttered a word or even felt the need to ask me about ME.✨

Fast forward to my court date, Mr. Miller was able to do what he does best and spoke with the DA regarding my case and was able to get the felony charges dropped all before my next court date in April😱 Like HUH..?!!? Say WHAT NOW SIR..?!?!🥹In total shock with everything and me crying like a newborn I couldn’t even process everything at the moment in knowing that Finally all of this mess is behind me and I will no longer have to deal with the courts system!!
I don’t know how the hell you did it Nathan but I will forever be thankful for all your expertise and hard work in getting this Awesome result for me and my family!🙏🏼

So If you’re looking for an attorney who actually cares and works fast for you Mr. Miller and staff is definitely the place to be! 💛
Thank you and I won’t be seeing you again anytime soon for any representation. LOL

It was a pleasure to work with Nathan Miller. He made it was such a breeze! The communication was crystal clear. Nathan was honest, upfront, and laid things out for me very simply.  The process was speedy and thorough. I would definitely recommend Nathan to anyone looking for legal assistance.

I can’t recommend Nathan Miller highly enough! From start to finish, he was professional, knowledgeable, and truly dedicated to our case. Thanks to his expertise and strategic approach, he was able to get the charges dismissed—a life-changing outcome.

His staff was equally impressive—always responsive, supportive, and ready to answer any questions we had. They made a stressful situation much more manageable with their excellent communication and professionalism.

If you need an attorney who truly fights for you and delivers results, look no further than Nathan Miller! We are beyond grateful for his hard work and the outstanding service from his entire team!

Mr. Miller was professional, personable, and diligent in gathering information regarding my case. He works hard to get to know his clients and ensure that they are informed and taken care of! His hard work resulted in a dismissal of the case!

I cannot thank Nathan Miller enough for the amazing work he has done for me and my family. His transparency, his thorough explanation and his calm demeanor put us as ease and he is super effective at producing positive outcomes. I highly recommend Nathan as your legal counsel.

I couldn’t recommend Nathan Miller Law enough! Nathan and his team were extremely informative and made sure I wasn’t left in the dark regarding my case. He fought for my case and I am so thankful I chose Nathan to represent me.

Simply put, there is no one I trust more with Denton County juvenile court system than Nathan Miller. Where others said it couldn’t be done, he did it. While I hope to never need his services ever again, I rest assured that if I do, I am in extremely capable hands. Highly recommend.

No words can explain how I felt when I was informed my case was dismissed. Nathan took the time to review it and was able to get it dismissed. I am glad I hired him to represent me and would definitely recommend.

Mr. Miller and his team are amazing! Mr. Miller exceeded my expectations. From my first free consultation he truly listened to my legal difficulties without judgement and not only provided exceptional results but also encouraged me to stay on the path of sobriety and healing. Alyssa was prompt in responding to any questions I had and was professional and kind! Rebecca his OM was super helpful as well. Thank you Attorney Miller for helping me get my life back and on the right path forward. If I could give him ten stars I would. Run don’t walk to seek legal counsel with Nathan Miller.
Outstanding. I will recommend Nathan Miller with complete confidence. His performance is of the highest level. And his staff is instrumental to his success. What a team he has organized.
Excellent service!!  Highly recommend
He is attentive and will go above and beyond. He is one of the best attorneys!! Give him a call.

One of my family members got a dui with at the time of driving, the BAC was above double the legal limit. She had consulted and researched different lawyers before finding Nathan Miller. Nathan is quick to understand the situation and has the ability to give an honest feedback about the different ways to go about with the case, and giving his recommendation for the best route to take with the current situation. In the court room, he is calm collective and has a demanding presence that draws the attention of the jury to focus on key factors. He has a ability to understand who you are and act as an professional extension of yourself to fight for you. I was used as a witness on the case along with other expert witnesses. He gave me confidence on the stand and I left with no regrets. He was able to secure a NOT GUILTY verdict for one of the highest BAC records in the county. I cannot recommend Nathan enough to represent yourself.
I'm really really late on my review. But Nathan was such a miracle to me, as simply as I can put it.  Thank you for everything Nathan🩷
Mr. Miller is fantastic. Highly recommend.

The BEST lawyer in Denton county. I wouldn’t have wanted it any other way. He went above and beyond to ensure me and my family would be taken care of through my entire court case! Nathan is by far #1 lawyer there is out there!

Disclaimer: Ive only just hired Mr Miller to represent me, so this review is based on the consultative portion of our interaction which, in my opinion, is the most important part. It’s the point that I - a consumer in need of legal representation - have to decide who the best person is to represent me, for the most fair price. Mr Millers prices are fair, and he took the time on a SUNDAY to answer all my questions and appear for me in court the NEXT DAY - a Monday. That alone should say something about Mr Millers services and his communication skills. (As far as the sub-par reviews go, there seems to be a common denominator - and that’s peoples incessant calling not getting an immediate response from him. Well, I for one hope that Mr Millers too busy to answer all but the most important questions I have. If I have questions that are unimportant/not time sensitive or even just updates on my case, I’ll direct them at his PARAlegal (derived from the Greek word ‘para’ meaning “beside”, or “next to”). We all know a lawyers time is very valuable - and for good reason. So in the event you do need a lawyer, you pay the lawyer that you can afford, and gives you the best chances of achieving the best outcome possible - and for me that seems to be Mr Miller. Just wanted to put my 2 cents in and clear some things up for any other skeptics that also took the time to read the sub-optimal Google and Yelp reviews. Cheers.

Nathan and Rebecca have helped me twice now and have never failed me! I am forever grateful for all the work he put into my case. Super easy to talk to and personable. They will answer any questions you have along the way! Definitely would recommend!

Nathan and his team were great. From day one he explained the process in a matter that was easy to understand. They were very knowledgeable and remained diligent on working on my matter despite the delay in court processes due to Covid. I couldn’t have asked for a better recommendation!! Many thanks to Nathan and the team!!!

I went to trial with Nathan Miller as my attorney for resisting arrest a few years ago. The definition of resisting is using force against the officer. The officer got on the stand and stated that I had not used force against him. Nathan did not move to dismiss the case or provide any defense at all. I fired him right then. The judge continued with the trial and sentenced me to 90 days because of Nathan's failure to defend me.

I’m actually jealous of all the clients who is giving out such good reviews because I did not get the same treatment at all. Said he would help me out on my case and even gave me a few details on how things will go and then disappeared on me. Contacted him over 10 times and did not receive an answer or any information about what was going on. The only time I have spoken with him was our first phone conversation. In the end I had to look for another attorney.

He has worked with and helped my husband through tons of issues.  He is very calm and will work through your issues from the beginning to the end.  He is a very busy guy but has Rebecca who is insanely patient and knows exactly what she is doing and will help you understand exactly what you are up against.

My son’s court date was today and has been reset for next month. Not sure if this is good since this is all new to us but I’ll update review accordingly. Hoping to have an outcome next month since he lives 4 almost 5 hours away now.

Update: Here we are 6 months later and we have had TWO no shows from Mr Paine!! Last court hearing was September and my son was advised he would be placed on Pre Trial Diversion. I emailed Mr Paine yesterday (Nov. 18th) to see if he needed to be in court. He immediately responded and asked if the PTD paperwork had been completed. I emailed back around 9 something am and then again at 11 something am stating he had not received any paperwork. There was no response from Mr Paine. We arrive today in court and he is no where to be found. We had to wait almost 4 hours for all cases to be done for them to reset, AGAIN. Now, while waiting I am told that this PTD could have been done the first announcement which was back in May! Not only that, I was told to contact the DA’s office regarding the PTD paperwork. I make the call to the DA’s office and they have no record of my son’s information being submitted to them!!!!!!!! Luckily the lady was really nice and looked him up and saw that he is to be setup. She was nice enough to say she will get the ball rolling and have someone from the prosecutor office contact Mr Paine. When I say it has been a NIGHTMARE dealing with him, it has! He barely communicates with his clients, it’s like pulling teeth to get a response at times. We live 5 hours away, common decency would have been to respond and let us know he had not submitted the information yet or told whatever lie… but to let us drive yet another 5 hours is ridiculous! Like I told him via email, this has taken a toll on me physically and mentally. If you want to be left guessing, having your case reset for no reason, then sure retain him!  I plan on taking my complaint higher up to the board because this is unacceptable and unethical!

As I’m typing this up, he emails and says “I’m sorry he does not live where he got arrested and asked if we contacted the DA office for the paperwork” what a complete joke!

I had put myself in a very difficult situation a couple years ago, and had hired Hank very shortly after my arrest. When my case was finally up for plea, Mr. Paine exhausted every avenue to get me the best deal possible on two charges. Represented my case extremely well in court. Got one of my charges completely dismissed, and deferred the other. I am extremely grateful to have an attorney that not only was the Denton County Prosecutor for over 20 years, is well versed in law, but has been working with these judges forever! If you catch a case in Denton County, you want to hire Henry Paine!

Stay away from this guy. He doesn’t work for you. He works for the prosecutor. He doesn’t respond to your text or phone calls. From the very beginning, Chrysandra and Christi were incredibly understanding and compassionate, taking the time to listen to our concerns and making sure we felt heard throughout the entire process.

With the sudden passing of my daughter Keisha, I needed legal assistance in becoming guardian to her 3 years old daughter, Khamryn.  A close friend of the family referred me to Ms. Jennifer. Ms. Jennifer and the office staff were always very kind, empathetic to my situation and also available to answer any questions I may have had whether in personal, phone or email.   Whenever we had to go to court, Ms. Jennifer would explain thoroughly what was to be asked so I would know what to expect. And that goes for any paperwork that I received or needed to sign. That journey finally came to an end in Dec. 2024. It is now 2025 and my husband and I enlisted her assistance with preparing our wills.  I feel that I could call upon her and/are staff if ever needed again.  Most "legal" people that I've run into seem cold, distant and talk over your head.  That was not the case with Ms. Jennifer and the ladies that worked in the office.  I will truly miss them.
Sincerely,
Rushell Cummings Overstreet

She looked up and saw that there was no will filed and asked what I wanted to do. I told her I didn’t understand what to do and how to go about handling this. She said there’s nothing to contest without a will, and  nothing can be done. End of story. I asked what I can do since my sister said there was a will and everything was left to her. I’m a novice who was seeking advice in the law firm’s area of specialty, but got the brush off.  It was like being wronged all over again.
The lawyer said it would cost $5000 to retain her services to contact my sibling who took everything.
It was obvious she did not want to help or care. She seemed rushed to get off the phone with no compassion and seemed disinterested in hearing what I had to say.
My dissatisfaction isn’t due to the information I received and I have no problem paying a $5k retention fee.  But it would only be to a lawyer who was not interested in hearing what I had to say and not cut me off and being rushed.  The whole conversation lasted maybe 10 minutes.  Listening indicates a lawyer would be acting in the best interest of their client.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Our office must keep client confidentiality, and we will not discuss client consultation details. Sometimes, the legal advice we provide is not what a client would like to hear. Our job is to ensure that our clients are informed about their legal options and how those options factor into their lives and goals. Pursuing a legal claim is also a business decision for our clients. We would not be providing our best representation if we did not prepare our clients for what they could be up against – both positive and negative.

Many factors are evaluated with every case presented, including the client's objectives, legal facts, and what legal remedies are available to each client depending on their circumstances.

Our office quotes a retainer on a case-by-case basis after considering the complexity and litigation required to achieve a client's objectives. Everything from court costs to your legal fees is paid from a retainer. Any retainer funds not used in support of your matter are 100% refunded to the client at the conclusion of representation.

If any client feels they have not received service to their satisfaction, we encourage them to reach out to our office to review the matter. It is important to our office to support our clients, and our door is always open.

reviews.text: HUGE waste of my time and money! Hired for a divorce case. Retainer was spent on mostly calls and emails over ??? Nothing was done to help me or my case move forward. Great Family Law Attorney
I was searching for a great family law attorney for my divorce. I had consulted with several attorneys and one of my questions - who would they pick to handle their divorce if they were in my shoes? The common answer was David Bouschor. David Bouschor has provided superior guidance during a very stressful time. reviews.text:
Going through a divorce is one of the hardest experiences a man can face, especially in a family court system that often feels biased before you even walk through the door. During that season of my life, Mark Montgomery wasn’t just my attorney — he was a steady, committed advocate who stood with me when everything felt stacked against me.

Mark worked long hours, dug into every detail, and fought for me with a level of dedication that went far beyond the job description. He listened, he cared, and he made sure I understood every step of the process. In a time when it would have been easy to feel alone, Mark showed up not only as a skilled lawyer but as a genuine friend.

What stood out most was his commitment to fairness. He believes in men’s advocacy, and he isn’t afraid to push back when the system leans the other way. He gave me a voice when I felt like I didn’t have one, and he fought for an outcome that reflected truth, not assumptions.

If you’re a man facing divorce or custody issues and you want someone who will fight for you, stand with you, and treat you with respect, Mark Montgomery is the attorney you want in your corner. I’m grateful for his work and the integrity he brought to one of the most difficult chapters of my life.

I have attempted to contact Mark multiple times since I have legally been an adult and over what I'd say is at least three years I have never received a call back, a returning email or anything that shows a shred of care for his client.
reviews.ownerResponse: I am not aware of who this person is. I have a great reputation for returning calls. Occasionally I will have a client that was a minor that I was appointed by the Courts to represent and when that person reaches the age of majority I am no longer their attorney . I did a search on both my office emails and my personal email and I do not have an email from anyone with that name. So to say I don’t care for someone who I cannot find a record that supports their claim seems unfair. I will say if this person will call my office at 469/952/6500 I will return their call . Otherwise I am confused by who this person may be.

reviews.text: Had a great experience with Montgomery law. They were very detailed in the process and kept me informed. They pushed to get a higher settlement and I am satisfied with my experience.
I have used Mark a few times for different things and he always made me feel like me and my case mattered. I will always recommend him to anyone that asks.

Don't use him if, David's f@t assets is there. Charging you ungodly $$$... You'll be doubled charged. Pay close attention to, your invoices. I should of known better. After, 6 months & I never once spoke with Mark.

Excellent family attorney

You need a good attorney you need to talk to Mark Montgomery he does excellent work
Mark and his staff go above and beyond for our family! I highly recommend him!
Mark is a bulldog who fights for his clients. There is no one I’d rather have in my corner.

This law office did everything to get me the best outcome possible. I had no idea what I was going to do? A lady driving a semi hit me while I was parked at a gas pump....unfortunately her dishonesty led me to get a lawyer.  Mark and his team are committed to getting the best possible outcome for any of their clients. I was fortunate to be referred to a great law practice.

Law knowledge seems to have come from a Google search, and not even fully read or understood. Documents created by this law office contains many typos, spelling mistakes, incomplete thoughts and sentences, and very unprofessional behavior.
To their response: Yes you did not represent me, you represent my ex-wife. So you're not lying but you are trying to dismiss this review by telling a half truth. (Misdirection such as this is considered the same as lying by the American Bar Association Model rules for your reference). I wasn't going to ever touch on this review again, frankly I want to never think of Montgomery again, but I can't let a misleading statement like this go by without responding. They not only tried to bring me up on sanctions to the court charges because of this post, in violation of the first amendment, they tried to do this under the same case of the divorce, after the divorce was finalized hoping to force me to spend more money on attorney fees and asking the court to have me pay them $1,500 dollars and force  me to remove this review. They filed the motion for sanctions without my ex-wife's consent or permission, again a violation of court rules. They lost to me pro-se and Mark Montgomery appeared close to physically attacking in the hallway outside of the courtroom afterwards.  Work with this lawyer is you will but know who you are dealing with.

This was the first number I called and a woman answered and asked for my name and a good number to reach me on as well as what I was needing a lawyer for. I gave her all this information and then after what I can only assume was her inputting the information I gave her, she asked me the details of my case or what they might be able to help me with. Having already told her at a very basic level what category my case would fall under, I assumed I was given the green light that they at the very least handled cases similarly but I still went into it knowing that just because someone has dealt with other cases that are similar, that doesn’t mean they can or will want to help with yours. I began to summarize my situation, not wanting to hold her up with all the nitty gritty details. I wanted her to be able to understand enough to be able to know if this was something they could move forward with. Im already struggling and trying to find the help I need. It’s already hard to trust someone you don’t know will do right by you and your family. This lady hung up on me mid-story. I gave her my call back #. Gave her a chance to call back. Nothing. I’d say if you want someone who cares….go elsewhere

Five years ago, this firm handled my divorce efficiently and cost effectively.  They were friendly, honest, and helped me significantly through one of the most difficult times of my life.

Recently, I was unable to find the copy of my final divorce decree, which I needed to sell my house.  Within minutes of my call, I had an electronic copy  in my email.  She could sense the stress in my voice and took care of it immediately.  Within just a few weeks, I had two certified copies.

The front desk staff are so helpful and friendly.  Thank you so much!

We need more caring, helpful, and honest law firms like this one.

I have known and worked with Jim and his fellow partners and office staff many times since 2013. A trusted friend recommended I use him for a very contentious divorce.   He was there for me every step of the way. During many times of uncertainty, I was glad he was on my side.  Every phone call was returned promptly and he was upfront about where I could save money.  I have sent 3 friends going through divorces to him for council and all three have given me glowing feedback on how he expertly handled each of their very different circumstances.   I was so impressed by his abilities and that of the office staff, I have since used his firm for my will, setting up two LLCs,  a marriage prenuptial, executorship for two deceased relatives and setting up a land trust for my children.  5 Stars is not enough.   He is by far one of the best lawyers in north Texas.

I have used their services on numerous occasions and have been treated with respect each time. I was told the truth about my civil matter even if it meant that they would not make more by continuing the litigation. I have noticed several very negative comments on google but as with all things when outcomes are not in your favor it is easy to talk down to your lawyer on social media than to realize you had a poor case.

James is a man of God dedicated to his profession and the people he assists.  There aren't enough stars or words to express the testimony I could give about James through years of court proceedings.  I saw first hand the respect given to him by the judiciary, staff, and opposing attorneys.  Any county, any case, criminal or civil, you will be well served to let James give explain your situation and potential outcomes.  Real answers and Rare Character.

reviews.text: I have no words to express my gratitude to the Albarado Law Firm for their personal involvement in my family case. I am grateful to their staff for their kindness, time, and effort. It was a relief to find a bilingual attorney who truly cared about my situation. His attention to detail gave me peace of mind during a difficult and complicated time in my life. Attorney Albarado is very precise, fair, and extremely skilled at negotiating with the other party and reaching a settlement where everyone agreed to the terms without having to take the case to court. I highly recommend Attorney Albarado to the entire Denton community and surrounding areas who are looking for a good defense attorney because he will fight for your rights to the end.

I can’t say enough wonderful things about the Albarado Law Firm. After consulting 4 different attorneys in the Denton area, I decided to hire Mr. Albarado for an enforcement case. His staff was very professional and made my difficult time easier and less stressful. Mr. Albarado went above and beyond to obtain justice for me. They also provide excellent bilingual services for anyone looking to hire the best lawyer in the area. Thank you for the amazing work that you do! I highly recommend Mr. Albarado to anyone needing a defense attorney, he fights for your rights until the end.

I knew what to expect. Emmanuel went above and beyond. They have compassion from experiences in their own lives, which to me, makes a huge difference in someone else's life. Thanks for that!

reviews.ownerResponse: Ricky, we have been understaffed due to the COVID pandemic. Despite this we have continued to kick butt and represent our clients zealously. An assistant has been out for a week because she had to travel outside of the country due to her grandmother being in hospice. As for yesterday, I along with my sister and brother who both work at the firm all hail from Uvalde, Texas. We have siblings and close family members that were directly involved in yesterday's school shooting. I am not trying to excuse our lack of response or our assistant's perceived behavior, I am just trying to provide an explanation.
