reviews.ownerResponse:
Your husband has had 6 DWI arrests in the last 15 years. He has been convicted previously of 2 felony DWIs. While he was on probation for his first felony DWI, he was then arrested once again on a second felony DWI. The probation violation along with the second felony DWI resulted in your husband being sentenced to 4 years TDC.

All of this happened prior to you retaining us (June 2020) to represent him on his 6th DWI arrest. His first court setting (arraignment) was on December 18, 2020. His second court setting (announcement) for January 29, 2021 was reset by the court to Friday February 19, 2021 (yesterday). The Denton County courthouse was closed on Friday as a result of the snow storm & loss of electricity. We have not canceled any court dates & have visited your husband at the jail on multiple occasions. We have communicated with both you & your husbands all of the happenings surrounding his case.

Your citizenship status, length of marriage, & amount of kids you have together do not grant your husband any form of immunity privileges that would prevent him from being charged with a DWI. Nor does the fact that he has diabetes grant him any privileges other than receiving the proper medication. Even if we were able to have his criminal case taken care of by now, because of his ICE hold he would still be kept in Immigration Custody because he lacks legal documentation to remain in the U.S.

Your husband's blood alcohol content (BAC) was three times the legal limit of 0.08. We have negotiated a plea bargain with the D.A.'s office but your husband has declined the agreement which he is entitled to do so. However, the D.A.'s office is not required to extend an offer that is to your husband's liking.

We are doing everything in our power to get you & your husband the best results possible given the circumstances.

reviews.text: I would recommend them to anyone... Their entire team is beyond great and treat you as family. Even though I was dealing with a stressful situation they gave me so much hope and I was able to rest knowing they were in control.. If you have any type of legal matter let them handle it for you. Their prices were affordable and their work was simply amazing.

I promised an update and here it is. Go elsewhere with your money!!! This law firm knows nothing about the definition of communication. I have been treated like I was unimportant to them since Jamie left the case. Time and time again they have failed to notify me of important issues or anything regarding my case for that matter. The one time I did go to court with him by my side, he failed to mention some of the most important requests that I had leaving me with a now judge-signed court order that I have yet to even see! He promised me that he would go over the court order as soon as opposing counsel had sent it to his office. He didn’t of course; I had no knowledge that opposing counsel had completed it. By the time I found out that Emmanuel had seen it, the time frame to discuss and/or dispute anything in the order had already long since passed. Now I’m forced to comply with this order because of his negligence.

I’m so disappointed in this firm and with how I’ve been treated, particularly with Emmanuel; the owner!! After I discovered that the orders are now officially in place, I called the office and demanded to speak with Emmanuel. I verbalized my concerns and he made no apology whatsoever, making excuses, justifications like, “you were there why didn’t you say anything?” Or, “I’m going to request a copy of the transcripts so you can hear for yourself.” Which he never did (shocker, right?).

I have been let down time and time again and decided to go get another attorney. I spoke with Emmanuel on the phone and requested that he withdraw from my case. He promised that he would be off my case by that Friday (giving him about 4 days to complete this task). It’s now been about 3-4 weeks and he has yet to submit his withdraw. I’ve been calling and sending emails and they STILL won’t reply to me or withdraw from my case. Now, they leave me no choice but to file a grievance.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your feedback. We appreciate it when our clients take the time to provide a review. However, I would like to address some of the issues you mentioned in your review and clarify the situation.

When we had our Temporary Orders Hearing set on 10.29.20, Judge Robison of the 393rd District Court of Denton County asked you multiple times whether: you heard the agreement; & understood the agreement. For which you answered, "Yes, Your Honor." He also asked you if thought that the agreement was in the best interest of your children. You responded, "Yes." Here is the court transcript for that interaction.

"JUDGE: Did you hear the terms of the agreement read into the record?

YOU: Yes, Your Honor.

JUDGE: You understood those terms?

YOU: Yes, Your Honor.

JUDGE: And you understand you could have had a hearing here today and you're waiving your right to have that hearing?
….

JUDGE: With that in mind, ma'am, did you hear the agreement read into the record?

YOU: Yes, Your Honor.

JUDGE: Okay. And you think, at least at this moment in time, it's in the best interest of the children? At this moment in time?

YOU: Yes"

Everything that you agreed to and that was read into the court's record was included in the temporary orders. It was unnecessary to go over the 30-pages of the drafted orders with you because I had already reviewed them and didn't have any issue with them based on the agreement. To review them with you would have incurred 2-3 hours of legal work that you would have had to pay for. Nothing in the Temporary Orders could be disputed because they did not include anything that we had not agreed upon. We requested the transcripts on 12.18.20 & requested that they be expedited. We received the transcripts two weeks later on 01.02.21.

I am unable to withdraw from you case because you have yet to sign the Agreed Motion for Withdrawal of Counsel that was sent to you. I am not able to withdraw from a case without a signed order from the presiding judge. This can happen in one of two ways. 1) if the client contest the withdrawal, a hearing will take place before the presiding judge and the judge will make a determination based on the testimony of both the attorney and the client. 2) If the client requests that their attorney withdraw, then it is unnecessary to have a hearing. However, the client must sign an Agreed Motion for Withdrawal of Counsel. You have yet to do this and that is why I am still on your case.

If I can be of any assistance in filing your grievance, please feel free to contact my office.

reviews.ownerResponse:
To get a better understanding as to the type of person who wrote this review, click on the link, to see the childish behavior she exhibited in the lobby of my office the day she came looking for a refund.

www.youtube.com/video/0733GkfgzEs

You came into our office as a walk-in, without an appointment. Even though we don't do walk-in consultations, my lead assistant (Angela) spoke to you about your case for 10-15 minutes. She then scheduled you for an attorney consultation the following day with our lead immigration attorney. Additionally, she charged half of what we normally charge for an immigration consultation because she was sympathetic to your situation and wanted to help you out.

When you came in for your consultation, our lead immigration attorney wasn't available because she was held up in court. As a result, I conducted the immigration consultation, being that I have more experience in immigration law than our lead immigration attorney. Angela did not take the half-priced consultation fee from you at the beginning of the consultation because she was aware that in your situation; there was no remedy for the specific issue you were concerned about. However, even though you had not paid the consultation fee, Angela wanted to give you a break while still having the opportunity to speak to an immigration attorney. She did not want to charge you the consultation fee if we could not be of service to you.

I came into Angela's office to consult you in regards to your specific issue. Angela briefed me as to the facts of the case & I then proceeded to ask you additional questions to see whether your husband had some form of immigration relief. Based on the information you provided, I explained that he would not have a strong case & you should not retain us because it was highly unlikely that we would be able to get the resolution that you sought.

After spending 5-10 minutes consulting you on the specific immigration concerns that you came in for, you began asking me subsequent questions regarding several other additional immigration issues. Had I only spent the 5-10 minutes consulting you on the specific immigration concerns you came in for, we would not have charged you the half-priced consultation fee. I spent an additional 20-25 minutes consulting and answering your additional questions. As a result, this became a full-fledged consultation for which we charged you the half-priced rate.

As a response to some of the additional questions, I stated that I wanted to get my lead immigration attorney to do some legal research so that we could provide you with the most pertinent & up-to-date advice on the current state of the immigration law relating to your additional questions. Contrary to popular belief, attorneys do not know everything in the fields of law, however we do know how to research the law to find the answers.

I'm sorry that we were unable to be of service to you, and we wish you & your husband the best.

Paid a retainer fee of 2500$ to them. Never heard a word for almost 7 months after the DA had dropped the case 30 days after my incident so 6 months ago. Called to cancel council and was told the 2500$ is non refundable. Bill never showed up to a court case and other than a 10 minute consultation we never spoke again. Don’t waste your money to be ripped off.
reviews.ownerResponse: Respectfully what you are asserting here is factually incorrect.  Also because of attorney client privilege I cannot discuss the details of your case. However, we filed a motion of your behalf and had a hearing.  Prevailed on that matter and then ultimately your case was not filed.  I have provided you a detailed invoice and waived the balance you had on your matter.  Most clients are satisfied with a successful outcome.  I have also made myself available to discuss this matter further.

reviews.text: I used Bill Kennedy Law for some identity theft legal issues. The team was very prompt! Called, scheduled an appointment, and had legal representation in a matter of days! They took care of the issue and notified me with results. Very professional and straight foward; would highly recommend.

Bill, by far, is the best attorney I have ever worked with.  The judicial system can be very stressful and confusing.  He and his firm listened intently to all my concerns and made it a seamless operation.  They make you feel like family!  I highly recommend and will work with this law office again.

I am a previous client of Mr. Bill Kennedy. He is a great lawyer who understands and listens to you. His staff is very friendly and helpful. Also, Joan Ballard is also one the best attorneys,  she handled my son's case with wisdom and intelligence. I highly recommend this firm. Thank you for all your support. I had the pleasure of working with Mrs. Joan Ballard. My experience was extremely positive. She is so smart, you can tell she has both knowledge and experience. Most importantly is her mannerisms. She was kind and caring. I never felt rushed or unheard. She took her time and made sure all my questions were answered. Mrs. Ballard made a stressful time more manageable. I am thankful we have attorneys like her around. I would highly recommend her and her team.
Deeply impressed at how much this firm genuinely cares for the people they represent.
As a fellow attorney, Joan is one of the first people I contact when I need to discuss PI issues (which I do not handle).
Bill was very helpful and straightforward. Bill and his staff kept me informed throughout the whole process. Definitely will recommend to anyone.

Highly satisfied with my experience. Bill Kennedy’s staff was thorough and professional. He educated me on what to expect, what the likely outcome would be, and then he achieved it. I would recommend Bill Kennedy Law to anyone needing a lawyer. Again thank you!

I highly recommend this law firm for anyone facing criminal charges. They are very knowledgeable and work very hard and are by your side the entire time. They communicate with you and are quick to answer any questions or concerns like no other attorneys will! Very happy with their services.

Bill has been helping us with a case that no parent would ever want to be faced with. Yesterday my brother in law who is very well known in the real estate industry went on the conference call to ask questions maybe we had not thought of. After the call he told my husband that he deals with attorneys everyday all day. He said it is rare to find someone As knowledgeable as Bill. He then asked my husband how did you find such a good attorney. He knows his stuff. That’s a huge compliment. We have been very pleased with his office and support. Thank you Bill and team!!😊❤️
Mr. Kennedy and his firm are professional and truly care for their clients. Overall, I am truly satisfied with the service and attention I received.
Bill and Joan are both fantastic attorneys that truly care about their clients. Highly recommend giving them a call !
Bill Kennedy Law PLLC handle different cases for me and my family and they are very professional and friendly.

Bill Kennedy Law works hard and cares about you. This firm made it easy to understand my case. They kept me updated and I was very happy with the outcome of my case. I will definitely be recommending to friends and family
Bill Kennedy is authentic and not afraid to fight for constitutional law! He is a warrior when it comes to your rights! I highly recommend him!

If I ever need a personal injury lawyer again, even though I hope not, but if I do,  I know where I will go back to! The service was outstanding and I felt very much taken care of, almost like part of the family!
Exceptional with personal injury. I had nowhere to turn and Bill took care of everything for me. Would absolutely recommend.

Bill and his team are professional, compassionate, and attentive. They believe in their clients and fight hard to get them the best outcome, no matter what. They treat people like people--not just cases and money and yet another case.
Bill Kennedy has a great team and I would recommend him.
This is a great team to work with. I highly recommend them.

Honestly out of all the attorneys in the Dallas area that claim to do everything they can to assist and help you no one made me feel more reassured than Mr. Kennedys law firm. They are very attentive and make you feel as if you are a personal friend or family member and not just another paycheck. I would recommend going to them especially with you personal injury case!

Mr. Kennedy and his team were very responsive when I called him for my case. Bill tried my case and we won......excellent trial attorney and I highly recommend him and his team for any legal matter you may have. His honesty in my experience was top notch!

Bill and his team are very kind and easy to work with. They really took the time to answer questions and made sure I understood everything that was going on. In situations that are often uncomfortable, they made me feel at ease. I had complete confidence in him and his team.

I just want to take a few minutes to thank Bill Kennedy, and his team.  They were so helpful in answering my questions, and made me feel very comfortable.  You can tell how passionate Bill is by how hard he works for you.  I was very impressed at the level of service that I received.  I highly recommend his firm, if you are in need of an attorney.

Very impressed with Bill Kennedy Law. The entire staff stayed on top of my case and went above and beyond to ensure I understood everything throughout the entire process.  Bill is by far the best lawyer I've ever worked with. Very thankful to have had him on my side.
Bill has represented me on several cases and always have had 100% satisfaction with him and his staff.

Bill Kennedy and his team were everything they promised to be.They were  very thorough and professional. When faced with nothing but the worst possible outcome, they came through with a better outcome than we could of  ever hoped for. I would recommend them to anyone  who is looking for someone to stand beside them and fight the fight with them. Our experience with Bill Kennedy law firm was a WIN!!
I have dealt with Mr. Kennedy on 3 different cases and thankfully was paid on all 3.  I am very pleased with my experience with this firm these folks took care of me.

Omg! This firm went above and beyond and final result was CHARGES DROPPED for my husband. Bill was nice and very professional. Joan was amazingly honest, pointed out things that others would've ignored and got out family back on track, now there's Donna......Omg she kept me from losing my marbles through this process. Donna was very straightforward and a big help to me and my kiddos! Hats off to this group for noticing we are humans and taking what could've been a diaster of a mess and fixing it. Thank you all for a great job well done! Thanks so much for giving us our life back.

The NNK Legal Group is the best experience I have had to date with a legal team.  They were proactive versus reactive which allowed for my issues to be resolved quickly and in my favor.  NNK 100% did what they said they were going to do and there were no surprises at the end. Bill Kennedy’s team’s was professional, knowledgeable and caring.  My future legal business lies with them and I urge others to give this practice a try.

What can I say except for, wow, I have never seen such a more considerate, sympathetic group of lawyers.They are vastly intelligent, diligent, strait forward and very thorough. They literally go above and beyond to make sure that you are well taken care of. I honestly can say I am extremely grateful to have them on my side!

I was referred to Lloyd and associates by the courthouse for my son’s pending case/charges. After missing the initial consultation, I paid for the follow up consultation. The rep scheduled the appointment at a time the office is closed! Then, after I called several times and left a VM, the lawyer calls me 2hrs after to discuss details of the case. Disappointing, but not the worst - things happen. But everything goes downhill from there.

I spoke w/Evan who after discussing the charges and case, offered me a price, and even ‘prayed’ for my son and the upcoming case.

I call almost 2wks later to request the contract to retain him as my son’s attorney and got hung up on by Inga who was short talking me about what I needed. Then after I told her I’d rather not deal with her, she calls back 5mins later to say the owner and Evan decided not to take the case.

How coincidental after your receptionist, Inga, was rude and hung up on me mid-sentence, without me being rude or ignorant in return, they immediately ‘decided not to take the case’.

Would not recommend.

Fantastic legal team to work with! Andrew Lloyd's knowledge of family law and the legal process in Texas is unsurpassed, and he knows just how to present a case and interact both with the judge and opposing counsel. He is backed up by a great team, too, including Office Manager Inga and Legal Assistant Jennifer. Working with them was a smooth, rewarding and ultimately successful experience. I highly recommend Lloyd & Associates.

I can not express to you how grateful I am to have had Andrew and Jennifer on my team. After ten plus years of being bullied by my ex I am finally free. I am free to just be my kids mom without being scared of what he will think or say. Andrew was transparent from day one and Jennifer was always there to listen. Since I filed for divorce in 2014 I’ve gone through plenty of attorneys and not one could ever come close to what this man accomplished. He asked me to trust him and I did. Thank you so very much for bringing peace to our lives.
Andrew Lloyd goes above and beyond. As long as he’s in business I will call him when ever I need help.
Andrew is amazing! My daughter has used him in the past as well. It’s hard to find someone who can produce desired results and is ethical. Andrew does that masterfully.

I was referred to Soyheyla Dixon by a friend for a family law case. Mrs. Dixon was wonderful to work with, along with her paralegal Paige. They were always responsive to my questions and concerns and helped keep me calm and reassured throughout the process. Mrs. Dixon is very knowledgeable about family law and it was evident throughout our hearings that she is well-respected within the legal community. I appreciate the fact that not only did I have a smart, strong advocate on my side, but also one that was mindful of my budget. You will not regret hiring this law firm to assist you in a family law case.

Soheyla was amazing. Dealing with family issues is stressful and she was so honest, smart and helpful. I really can’t thank her and this law firm enough for helping our family get closure and a final agreement that was fair to everyone. Thank you so much!!!
If I could give 0 stars I would
Jennifer is awesome
Such an amazing group of people who helped me so much with my divorce. They work so hard!

Amazing staff, and very trustworthy.
Thank you, for everything.

Andrew was the attorney for my daughter/grandson in a Geographic change case. This has been going on for years and is an incredibly difficult case. We are so thankful to have a positive outcome and have my daughter and grandson in a safe environment now. We are truly thankful for all the hard work, preparation and detail he and his team put into this case.

Andrew, Paige, and the entire team at Lloyd & Associates were fantastic! Andrew represented me in 2 separate cases at the same time, and I always felt like I was in capable hands. He answered my questions, fought for my children and me, and reassured me along the way. I couldn't be happier.

Straight forward and is not out to get your money. He truly cares and gets excited for the fight, which I love! He’s great breaking things down to understand. And very quick and doesn’t waste time or your money. I can say hands down I recommend him if your every in need of an attorney.
Soheyla is one of the best attorneys I have ever had the pleasure of working with! She's extremely confident and makes sure she fights for her clients! Thank you for all of your hard work!!!!

Great law firm, very attentive! I have used them twice now. Paige the paralegal is phenomenal! The staff is very responsive. Sometimes things take a little while to complete, but thats typical of any legal case with any law firm. So grateful for their kind, expert advice!

Andrew Lloyd is the best attorney in the WORLD. I have never met someone that cared so much! He I’ll fight for you!!!! He is what make a difference looks like! I’m so happy to if crossed paths with this wonderful person. My family is forever in debt to you. Thank you so much for all you have done!

I, Victoria Meza, would like to rescind my previous five star rating. I understand that there has been an enormous impact on courts, jobs, etc, due to this pandemic. However, I've been trying to speak to Someone! Anyone. I call several times a day. Going on four days now. Please, at least set a bond for him. It is imperative that we speak...
Thank you.

Confused and lost, No more!!!
Thank you Ms. Brianna! You were so helpful. Our family has been in the dark for a while now in regards to our loved one, until today. You gave us hope and provided me with many options. Thank you for being marvelously kind and understanding. We hope to have our family member with us soon...

Andrew Lloyd is an amazing attorney, in all aspects he is very attentive and personal to your case and in any field he will fight for you and succeed in getting the best case scenario you deserve. I HIGHLY recommend Andrew and his law firm to anyone with any issue. If I ever need help again it will be with the Lloyd law firm.

He has helped and continues to help me and my family however he can and you can't put a price on that.
Very professional and friendly. Made a difficult family law issue as quick and painless as possible given the circumstances. Super easy to work with and fantastic communication. Thank you

Devon should be disbarred! He tried to represent me on a criminal charge 7 years ago and his advice was to plead guilty to a class 3 felony and serve 5 years. I tried to tell him that the maximum sentence for my charge was only 2 years. I hired another lawyer and plead for 6 months. The other lawyer was astonished at the incompetence
They took great care of me and my babies during my divorce. Couldn't be happier with the results!
I have been working with Andrew since 2015.He has really fought for me and my family and I love him for them that ..I would highly recommend him

We have had the pleasure of Andrew Lloyd as our attorney and we could not be happier! Professional and caring with a sense of humor! He was great and made sure we always understood everything and were updated and even personally called us to check on things occasionally. When you call the office you get exceptional service from the team they have working there. Five stars!!!
Andrew & Paige are AMAZING !!!
Andrew and Paige, were very attentive to my specific needs during this rough time.  I would easily recommend this counsel to anyone needing help.

Horrible customer service you're lucky to get a call or a email 1-2 months after leaving several message.  They settle with my insurance company for the same offer I was offered without a lawyer.  When we called to ask question they had no idea about our case. I understand we are not their only client but you should know a little about the case. I've requested an itemized bill from the law office several times to date I have never received one, we never received or signed settlement paperwork the lawyer did it all without our approval. Today we received a settlement of $11.00, the doctors received $3000.00 and the law office from what I can tell without any bills or settlement paperwork received $4500.00.  Thank you for wasting almost two years of my life for $11.00.

I have had to deal with a lot of attorneys throughout my divorce and child support hearings, none of which hold a candle to Tiffany. Professional, knowledgable, and efficient. I cant thank you enough for getting this taken care of and allowing me to get on with my life.
I fount their work to be very reassuring over a long and uncertain time.  In the end, outcome was better than expected.   Our family was blessed to have placed our trust in them

I would rate Andrew Lloyd firm as a ZERO. DO NOT use this firm!! They will tell you that they are honest and have your best interest at heart. COMPLETELY FALSE. They are the worst! Stay away! They switched lawyers on me, lost paperwork and over charged me. DO NOT USE THEM!

Andrew Lloyd is a brilliant legal mind.  He demonstrates in passion for the law, his clients and carefully guides his clients through the process.  I most of all admire his study of the law and ability to quickly find answers to his clients needs.  I highly recommend Andrew Lloyd

Horrible service!! My lawyer didn't even talk to me until the day before court, then showed up late to court! I was the only one still outside of the courtroom when he showed up. That alone cost me $3000- never even saw him before court date and 1 phone conversation day before court-that was it. Then I paid additional retainer fee in full- 2 months later - after NO FURTHER CONTACT-they say I owe them more. They couldn't "find " my payment- then a week later said they found $1000 payment but not the other $2k paid on the same day at the same time!!!! Absolute scam and horrible service--do not go here. Even my opposing lawyers were appalled at what I paid and what went down!

Devon DuPuy is honest, extremely intelligent and quick to fight for his clients. It was very apparent to me the few times we entered the courthouse that Devon's reputation speaks for itself. Devon is well respected among his peers and by the Denton County Court. Let me tell you...Devon is fierce, but fair. He is straightforward and his level of integrity is admirable. I have had the unfortunate experience of child custody modifications, multiple family court related issues all stemming from a terrible divorce and a relentless effort to alienate me from my child--even false criminal accusations that over the last seven years literally cost me hundreds of thousands of dollars. When you reach out for help, especially from an attorney, you are suppose to feel safe-not taken for a ride and used as a paycheck with no real interest in an innocent child's life and the long term, life altering changes families deal with as a result from court and the rulings being made. I have had a level of anxiety over the last seven years that I would not wish on my worst enemy. I can finally say, for the first time--Devon made that go away and words will never describe how thankful I am to him and his staff (Alisha and Minerva) for their compassion and dedication--not just to me, but working for the best interest of a child as well.  Thank you.
reviews.ownerResponse:
S.C., thank you so much for kind words. I am truly humbled by your graciousness. And thank you for including my staff in your glowing remarks. The staff of L&D is the absolute best, and it is my sincere honor to work with such a dedicated, intelligent staff that knows how to fight effectively but also efficiently for our clients. Andrew and I could not do what we did for you and what we do for all our clients without their help!

Again, thank you for your heartfelt words of appreciation. Sometimes people forget that lawyers are people as well, and comments from clients of mine like this are what help keep me from being too cynical. They help me get up and fight the good fight every day. Thank you for your trust, S.C. If there is ever anything we can do to help you or your friends or family in the future, please give us a call. Till then, best of luck to you and to your child.

-Devon DuPuy

reviews.text: He is one of the worst attorneys I have ever had and I had two attorneys involved in my divorce in 2005. I hired Andrew in August 2014 for a re-modification hearing that was based on lies from my ex. He never addressed any of the lies that started this case. We only went to trial once and I paid him 5 grand. He is money hungry and charged me for every little thing. He did not do what I asked because he said, "that is not my strategy". I feel like he did not represent me when we only came to court one time. I paid him $5000 in August and then wanted another $3000 in February. He only went to court once in a trial in November 2014. Now I am stuck with a mess and I refuse to give him another dime. He asked for withdrawal from the case because I did not give him the $3000 PLUS replenish the retainer fee. I WOULD NEVER REFER ANDREW TO ANYONE!!!! He is basically a fraud in my books.
reviews.ownerResponse:
I am so sorry that you had a bad experience with our firm. I don't know the facts of your case, but I do know that Andrew's reputation is above reproach in this community and among our local judges. However, life is messy, and no one can be all things to all people despite how hard we all try. I'm sorry it didn't work out with us, and I wish you all the best in the future.

-Devon DuPuy

reviews.text: I like the style and he trys get the best results for you.

-Devon DuPuy

reviews.text: I'm really satisfied and thankful in the way mr.peugh helped me. he's staff are really professional and helped me. Mr peugh is the best I highly recommend him.

I live next to this place and almost every other night there is a live band or someone playing drums there with the window open so loud that I can hear it CLEARLY and I am not even the closest apartment to them. I have called the police almost 5 times now. I wouldn’t care if it was during the day but it is 99% of the time after 9 pm which I work at 8 am the next day and have to be up at 6. reviews.text: Best experience I've had with a attorney

I was 19 when i got my first felony charge, along with other serious offenses, and after continuing to get in trouble and really making it tough for Dan to get a good result on my cases, he still fought tirelessly for me. My future was looking grim, but once i finally listened to all of Dan’s advice, and just do my part so he could do his- he got my felony reduced to a misdemeanor, and all other charges dismissed. I’ll no longer be a felon, and can still enjoy my freedom while i’m on probation (no jail time). I couldn’t be more pleased and more thankful for the results i got and to have such an amazing, dedicated attorney. And Cara Montoya is extremely responsive. Never had to wait more than a half hour to get an email back from her, with all my questions answered.

Dan and Cara were absolutely amazing. They answered every time I called, and responded promptly and professionally to every email.

They listened to my questions and gave detailed answers throughout the entire process. I will be recommending them to anyone looking for legal help. I cannot thank them enough for all of their help.

Thank you Peugh Law Firm!
My experience was great! Dan and Cara are both AWESOME at what they do. My case was completely resolved and I couldn't be happier, worth every penny!!

My family had the need to request Mr. Peugh's services for an unfortunate turn of events.   Having never been in need of any services like this before he and his team walked us through the process and got us the best possible outcome.   He was straight with us on possible outcomes and what best avenue to take.   This was the best call I made.

The Peugh Law Firm is truly client focused.  Daniel Peugh and Cara Montoya (paralegal) lead, explained and shared concise and understandable legal protocols related to my case.  When I had questions they would respond within 24 hours.  Daniel and Cara were truly joyful in helping.  These folks are real and easy to work with.  I am extremely grateful for their service.
I want to apologize. It was a misunderstanding I now understand that you cannot give me any information about your client.

reviews.text: Helped me get out of a very serious issue that could have affected my future for the worse. good advice, very responsive, and always there for his clients.
Mr. Peugh is very good lawyer where he help me tremendously with my case.  Thank you very much.
I would highly recommend Peugh Law firm. They were efficient, friendly and affordable for what I was needing.

The legal process is overwhelming in and of itself. It’s important to find legal counsel that is knowledgeable and experienced in the the specific area of the law you need assistance from, in addition to the county your case originates from. If you want exceptional representation, Mr. Peugh’s office is right where you need to be. From the moment you contact his office, and speak with his amazing  paralegal Cara to the continuous and prompt updates about your case, you will not be disappointed. Thank you Dan & Cara for everything you do!

Mr. Peugh and his assistant Cara are the best!. They literaly saved my life with helping me with my legal troubles. They answered questions and return emails fast.. I couldnt be more pleased with the results. I Highly recommend!!

Dan and Cara have been wonderful to work with.  Both have worked very closely with me and have given me advice during my case.  Dan worked hard to get a reduction in terms and was very helpful in helping navigate the court system and alerted me to what to expect.  Dan also provided guidance on things to do prior to court to help my case.  I did as directed and as he had advised I saw better results.  I would highly recommend Dan.  I feel that Cara his assistant has gone out of her way to help and has kept me informed during the whole process.

Mr. Peugh and his team were very helpful and worked hard to get the best outcome we could hope for considering the situation. They were quick to respond and always took the time to answer questions and help us understand everything. Highly recommend.

I hired Mr Peugh for my husband, gave him $3500 to begin with so that he could begin with his representation on 2-18-18 and he was out all of 2 weeks and Mr. Peugh was asking for another 3500 to continue serving my husband. He had done nothing at this point and dropped my husband Bc he couldn’t make the 3500 payment by March so he keeps 3500 and never represents him. Seems off to me but I want people to know that this is the type of business he runs so that you aren’t unaware.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Guidry was not charged $3500. He signed a contract to pay $10,000 for representation on three First Degree Felonies. That contract included a payment plan that allowed Mr. Guidry to pay $3,000 down and make two monthly payments of $3,500 to cover the balance. As we were retained early in the cases, there was time for a payment plan and that is why the payment plan option was extended to Mr. Guidry. Unfortunately, Mr. Guidry decided that, since his cases had not been indicted yet, that he did not have to honor the terms of the contract. He took the very reason that we could offer him a payment plan (additional time before the cases are in Court) and used it as an excuse not to pay what he agreed to pay. Further, he never responded to us when we inquired about the missed payments nor, did he ever reach out to us to request a different payment arrangement. With the contract breached, the money past due and no communication from our client, we terminated the representation.

It is not true that we did nothing for the money we were paid. When we are hired, we begin work right away for our clients. First, we give advice to our clients regarding their next steps after arrest and things they can be doing to help their defense. We request reports from the arresting police agency (arrest reports that include at least the probable cause information) and those reports are forwarded to client with additional advice if applicable. We also establish contact with the DPS Crime Lab in Garland so that we can know the results of any testing of controlled substances, BAC tests or DNA testing before the results are sent to the DA's Office. Contact is also established with the Intake Division of the DA's Office as well, so that we will not be surprised when a case is set for it's first court hearing. Mr. Guidry benefited from all of these services. The representation broke down over unpaid legal fees and a lack of communication.

We do not withdraw from cases at the first sign of financial trouble. We routinely re-work payment plans when there is time remaining to do so. However, we are not able to do that where a client will not communicate with us. I hope readers will take from this response how important and beneficial it is to keep in good contact with your attorney.

reviews.text:
*****An God Sent Angel Uplifted Me From Darkest Times Of My Life*****

I am Kumar from India and an IT professional working as a software developer. I have been living in the United States for more than a decade. Unfortunately, I was falsely accused of domestic violence involving false allegations and lies. As a result, I was embroiled in felony and misdemeanor charges

Mrs. Darlina Crowder is a seasoned criminal defense attorney. She is fearless, extremely aggressive in defending her clients, ethical, trustworthy, knowledgeable, experienced, and a truly strong individual in the courtroom.

When I first consulted Mrs. Crowder, she patiently listened to my version of events. She is an exceptional listener who carefully understands the details of a case. After reviewing my situation and going through the documentation I had, she was able to see through the case quickly. She assured me that she would do everything in her power to fight for me and pursue justice, even if it meant going all the way to a jury trial.

From the beginning, I saw that she was someone who stands by her word. She was not interested in pushing unnecessary plea deals and showed a clear willingness to fight directly in court when justice required it. At that moment, I truly felt that Almighty God had sent an angel to guide me through one of the darkest moments of my life.

Mrs. Crowder took over my case as lead counsel and thoroughly reviewed every detail, including family law records, documentation, and exhibits. Her preparation for trial was meticulous and relentless. We were fully prepared to present the truth before a jury.

Ultimately, just a few days before the scheduled trial, all the charges against me were DISMISSED.

I will always remain grateful to Mrs. Crowder for her fearless advocacy, integrity, and dedication to protecting my name, my career, and my future.

If you are facing serious criminal charges and want an attorney who is strategic, aggressive in the courtroom, ethical, and deeply committed to her clients, I highly recommend Mrs. Darlina Crowder.

I would also like to make a special note that Mrs. Crowder has successfully represented many clients from the Asian/Indian community and has experience handling cases involving complex cultural and family dynamics. Her ability to understand the background, context, and nuances involved in such situations is remarkable. Because of her experience and insight, she was able to approach my case with clarity and strategic thinking. I would strongly recommend Mrs. Crowder to anyone, including members of the Indian community, who may find themselves facing serious legal challenges. She is truly someone you want by your side when your future is on the line.

Darlina Crowder and The Crowder Law Firm are truly passionate about saving lives and working relentlessly for each and every client. There is no attorney more thorough, experienced, and knowledgeable than Ms. Crowder, and her team of attorneys are just as impressive. I highly recommend The Crowder Law Firm for anyone seeking criminal defense!
Ms. Crowder is the go to criminal defense attorney in Dallas, TX for all your criminal law needs.

Ms. Crowder and her team are great at what they do. They are hard workers and know what they’re talking about. I appreciate their tenacity about fighting for their clients in and out of the courtroom. They are the best at what they do.

Lawyers are a dime a dozen, but Darlina Crowder and her team are one in a million! When you’re looking for a lawyer go in a make your own opinion you won’t be disappointed.

The Crowder Law Firm is one of the strongest criminal defense firms in Texas. Darlina Crowder’s courtroom reputation, track record, and relentless work ethic speaks for themselves, she has built a team that takes every case seriously and fights with real skill, and determination. Their clients benefit from thorough investigation, strategic planning, and decades of trial experience. If someone needs a defense team they can rely on when everything is on the line The Crowder Law Firm is the one I would recommend every time.

reviews.text: I hired this attorney and paid a retainer, but over a year there was almost no communication or progress. She said she was busy working on other cases “day and night,” which was why she didn’t respond. The day before a scheduled court date, she withdrew, demanding $40,000 and leaving us scrambling at the last minute. I felt completely blindsided, vulnerable, and stressed, not knowing how my case would proceed. My case is still pending, and unused retainer funds have not been returned. I am filing a grievance with the State Bar. I strongly advise anyone considering this attorney to carefully review communication, fees, and case management. Also the reviews that are bad are from real person like me and I wish I would have considered them before hiring her.

The Crowder Law Firm was extraordinary in handling my multiple charges. Darlina Crowder was relentless, and her attorney Raven Williams as well, in not allowing me plead to any false allegations that the State could not prove. They were able to get my case dismissed and I felt confident in their knowledge, leadership, and guidance at every proceeding. I am extremely grateful for their remarkable commitment.

reviews.text:
I would not recommend Darlena Crowder or her firm at all!!!!!!

Our family hired this firm for a very serious case, and from our experience, the representation felt impersonal and unprepared. It often felt more focused on money than on truly advocating for my brother.

Different attorneys showed up to hearings instead of the attorney we retained, and several times they appeared unfamiliar with the case details. They were asking my brother basic questions right before going into hearings, which was extremely concerning and made us feel like his case was not being taken seriously.

Communication was poor, and we frequently felt left in the dark about what was happening. In the end, the firm withdrew from the case, leaving us scrambling to find new representation while facing an upcoming trial date.

This was a stressful and expensive experience that did not meet our expectations. I strongly encourage anyone considering this firm to carefully read reviews, ask tough questions, and make sure you are confident in who will actually be handling your case. Be prepared to lead the case because they don't suggest anything wasted our time a whole year and nothing was ever done Darlena was horrible not sympathetic at all just laughed at our questions and left us more confused she was not what so ever compassionate nor understanding RUNN with you money or they will take it !!!!

From our First consultation, they were professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely cared about my son's case. Darlina Crowder and staff had kept me informed about my case every step of the way! If u need a skilled, trustworthy lawyer Darlina Crowder and Firm is the best!

reviews.text:
I’m deeply grateful for Crowder Law Firm, and especially for Darlina Crowder. I hired her during one of the darkest and most overwhelming periods of my life. I was facing a serious legal situation while also going through a painful family crisis, including separation from my son. Mentally and emotionally, I wasn’t okay, and I needed an attorney who could be relentless and sharp in court, but also steady, grounded, and genuinely human when everything felt like it was falling apart.

Darlina was exactly that.

From the beginning, she treated my case with urgency and purpose. She didn’t waste time on distractions, and she was direct about what mattered, what didn’t, and what would actually move the needle. Her approach was strategic, organized, and realistic, never sugarcoated, but always focused on protecting me and positioning the case the right way. As the court date got closer, her leadership became even more obvious. Just a week before trial, when anxiety and pressure were at their highest, she helped me stay structured, stay calm, and avoid mistakes that could have hurt my case. That kind of guidance matters more than people realize until they’re living it.

What stood out most is that she never treated me like “another file.” She understood the stakes weren’t just legal, they were personal, professional, and life-altering. She took the time to understand the bigger picture of what I was carrying, and she handled it with professionalism and empathy. She was firm when I needed discipline, clear when I needed direction, and steady when I needed reassurance. That balance is rare.

Her team also deserves real credit. They were responsive, professional, and consistent. I always felt that my defense was being handled seriously, with a lot of work happening behind the scenes, not just surface-level communication. Even when things were stressful, I didn’t feel ignored or left guessing. I felt supported and kept in the loop in a way that reduced panic and built trust.

Right before trial, when the pressure was at its peak, Darlina’s experience showed in every way. She knew how to frame the case, how to anticipate issues before they became problems, how to manage risk, and how to keep me from being pulled into unnecessary traps. She was prepared, sharp, and composed, exactly the kind of attorney you want when everything is on the line.

We ultimately achieved the best possible outcome for my situation, and I will always be thankful for her work and for how she carried herself during a time when I was barely holding it together. If you need a defense attorney who will fight hard, think clearly, communicate directly, and still treat you with compassion during a personal crisis, I strongly recommend Darlina Crowder and Crowder Law Firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: It was truly an honor to represent you. It was even more special when you and your family surprised our entire team last week after we received the State’s Motion to Dismiss. It’s days like those that make all of our long hours and late nights all worthwhile. I can tell you the news about your dismissals sent a ripple of cheers and tears throughout both of my offices. We were so excited for you because we understood the weight and the toll it took on you with these false allegations. We take these cases very serious and truly understand the severe consequences it has on someone’s life. Especially the potential consequences it had on yours. It was so nice meeting your family and friends as well. Thank you for the kind words about our team especially. It is sometimes hard to convey how hard our team works behind the scenes but I’m so glad you were able to see it and know that here at The Crowder Law Firm we work as a team. There is strength in numbers and strength in the systems I have in place. You got to see it. The paralegal team loved that you acknowledged their work as it is cases like yours that keep them fighting! At this firm we fight day and night and on weekends to get the best results for our clients.  We wish you nothing but the best!!

reviews.text: Amazing law firm!!! Darlina Crowder helped me all the way through. I have went through this law firm for my first criminal case. I had a misdemeanor theft on my record and they helped me reduce my time to just 1 year probation and community service. I eventually had this record sealed. Came back years later, I went back here again for my second criminal case which was a felony theft and she got me reduced sentence to 3 year probation instead of serving time inside jail. reviews.text:
This is only receiving a 3-star rating because Ms. Crowder kept me out of prison when I believed all hope was lost. For that, I am genuinely grateful. However, beyond that outcome, the treatment and interactions I experienced after my sentencing was completed have ensured that I will never do business with this firm again.

After completing my probation five years later, there were a few minor legal matters I needed to remedy. On my sentencing day, I was told directly by Darlina Crowder that upon completion of my probation, I would be able to use her services pro bono to resolve this minor issue. Once my probation was completed, not only was I met with doubt from her legal team regarding the validity of what she had told me, but I ultimately had to pay several hundred dollars to resolve the issue anyway. While frustrating, I agreed to pay because I wanted to put the entire situation behind me.

What followed was over a year and a half of miscommunication, being ignored, and clear frustration from lower-level staff who were unable to resolve the issue. Despite being described as “minor,” this matter played a pivotal role in the ease of my day-to-day life. After reaching my breaking point, I decided to investigate the issue myself. I identified the central hiccup in the stalled conflict with the opposing party in a single phone call—information that their team of professionals had been unable to obtain for over a year. I provided this information to their paralegals to forward to Ms. Crowder.

Approximately two weeks later, I received a call from Ms. Crowder herself, during which I was told that they had done all they could for me and that the issue was “my problem” to figure out. I informed her of the information I had already provided to her paralegals, but it was brushed off as illegitimate. During that same call, she asked me to send the information directly to her in real time so she could review it herself. Once she understood where the miscommunication was, my situation was resolved in less than a week.

Notably, there was no follow-up from her firm and no apology for the doubt, prolonged miscommunication, or lack of professionalism.

Again, I am grateful for what Ms. Crowder did for me in the past, and ultimately in this matter as well. However, the rudeness, dismissal, and disregard I experienced—especially after over a year of requesting to speak with her and after paying twice—was unacceptable. I sincerely hope I never need legal representation again, but if I do, this firm will never receive another penny from me.

It was clear from the outset that they had not done their homework, as they fumbled basic questions and failed to present crucial evidence to support my case. To my disbelief, their poor representation led the judge to dismiss the case (you can look it up in the public records for the City of Denton), despite the tenant's clear violation of our rental agreement.
The lack of professionalism and competence from both attorneys was astonishing. I expected to work with experienced professionals who would fight for my rights as a landlord, but instead, I was met with a careless and disorganized defense that ended up costing me time, money, and a resolution to the situation.
The only reason I’m giving them a two star review is because they were quick to issue the refund of the retainer fee and the consult fee, thus admitting their error.

reviews.text: My wife and I wanted to revise our existing living trust.  We, like many retired folks here in Texas, have a home, an IRA, kids and grandkids in the area. To make what could be a very long story short, our trust grew from a one half inch binder to 4 full binders of documents covering all aspects of our estate planning, trusts, wills, powers of attorney and comprehensive health care directives.  Leigh and her team were professional, polite and had very direct answers for our many questions.  The result, in addition to the impressive array of documents, was a turn-key checklist to get all the property / assets / retirement accounts, etc., properly organized and titled so when that day comes, the transition for the surviving spouse, kids and grandkids will be as smooth as possible in that sad time.  Our experience was very satisfying and gave us a very strong sense of relief looking to the future.  Well done.

I wanted to take a moment to express my sincere gratitude and utmost satisfaction for the exceptional service I received from Leigh Hilton PLLC in the preparation of my living trust. Your team's professionalism, expertise, and genuine commitment to ensuring my peace of mind throughout the entire process were truly outstanding.

From my initial consultation to the final signing, every interaction with Leigh Hilton PLLC was marked by a level of care and attention that exceeded my expectations. Your team's ability to demystify complex legal jargon and concepts, while providing me with clear and concise explanations, made the process feel seamless and approachable.

I was particularly impressed by how well your team listened to my individual needs and concerns. The personalized approach taken by Leigh Hilton PLLC reassured me that my living trust was not a one-size-fits-all solution, but a carefully tailored plan that reflected my unique circumstances and wishes. This level of dedication, combined with your team's extensive knowledge in estate planning, instilled a deep sense of trust and confidence in the final documents.

The thoroughness and attention to detail displayed by Leigh Hilton PLLC during the living trust preparation were truly commendable. Your team left no stone unturned, ensuring that every asset and aspect of my estate was properly addressed and protected. This level of meticulousness not only showcased your team's expertise but also provided me with a sense of security that my loved ones' future is well-protected.

Beyond the technical expertise, I greatly appreciated the genuine care and compassion exhibited by everyone at Leigh Hilton PLLC. It was evident that your team's priority was not just the legal aspects of estate planning, but also the emotional well-being of your clients. This human touch made the entire process feel less daunting and more like a collaborative journey towards securing my family's future.

In conclusion, my experience with Leigh Hilton PLLC has been nothing short of exceptional. I wholeheartedly recommend your services to anyone seeking expert guidance and support in preparing a living trust. Your team's dedication, professionalism, and personalized approach set a standard of excellence that truly distinguishes Leigh Hilton PLLC from the rest.

Thank you once again for providing me with peace of mind and a comprehensive living trust that I can confidently entrust to safeguard my family's legacy.

The team at HKH, led by the most professional and caring family attorney we could have every wished for, Alyssa Herrington, literally carried us through this very difficult situation. At times it seemed like this legal matter would never end, and Alyssa and her team advised and counseled my wife and I all the way through to the most ideal outcome we could have ever imagined. Our grandson has been placed with us as his sole managing conservators, he is part of a big family that loves him so much, he is a thriving rowdy almost 3 year old little boy, and most importantly, he is very much connected to his mother and father.

Alyssa, Caitlin, Rachel, and Hastings... Thank you so much for your dedication to our case, your understanding to my wife and I because I know we drove you crazy at times, the guidance and counseling for 2+ years to do the right things that were so hard to do, but kept us on track to for best outcome for our grandson.

You will hear from us every May 15th!

When I take the time to write a review its means my expectations have been met or exceeded.
In the case of the law firm of Hanshaw Kennedy Hafen , LPP I would say they were exceeded which I will explain why later.  Jodie was my first contact who answered several important questions to my full satisfaction  and then arranged a consultation with the correct attorney.  Alyssa was the attorney who I explained why the changes to my existing trust were required in my opinion. After listening she then offered options on how we could accomplish the end goal so we began to move forward.
Why I say my my expectations were exceeded  is I reside in Europe and was only returning to the states for a limited time.  That being said almost everything had to be completed before I boarded my flight and the one document required to be able to complete the revisions to trust would not be available until near the end of my trip, a very tricky time frame to manage and it was managed perfectly. Yes perfectly and beyond my expectations because I dropped off the last document needed and I was given a draft copy for review and I realized that I would like to add a few additions and emailed in three emails during the evening.  When I arrived to sign the trust the following day and have the notary stamp the trust everything was perfect.
You can feel you have the one of the best if not the best when you hire Hanshaw Kennedy Hafen, LPP
Joseph G,
Malaga, Spain

reviews.text: Was honestly really disappointed when I met with this firm. They charge a pretty hefty consultation fee that no other law firms are charging. But they seemed legit so I paid it anyway. I came to them with a bunch of different things I needed handled and they stuck me with two younger gentlemen who honestly didn’t seem like they knew what they were doing or talking about. Then they came back wanted to charge a $10,000 retainer for every single case. Even ones that needed a simple demand letter sent out. Not sure why we couldn’t do one $10,000 retainer and then continue to pay into that as it runs out like every other attorney. I think that they might be good attorneys but I wouldn’t know because I never got that far. I just felt like I got ripped off because I paid the consultation fee of several hundred dollars and then they gave me some insane price to basically tell me they didn’t want my business and then don’t refund the consultation fee. I’m sorry but I’m not giving a $50,000+ retainer. That is insane. I would highly suggest talking to other attorneys before paying them for a consultation with some of their associates.

reviews.text:
*Update: Moved from a 1 star to a 2 star review because Collin Kennedy (partner of firm) called and apologized for the issue listed below. He also offered to refund my consultation fee, which I declined. Many business owners would not admit that their associate made such an error so I commend him reaching out.

I paid $300 for a 1 hr consultation with Daniel Gonzalez. After meeting for 40 min Mr. Gonzalez stated he would contact me regarding putting a $5,000 to $10,000 retainer to cover any work expenses, which I was agreeable to. The situation was that I have a contractor not fulfilling their contract to remodel my home (has been 8 months) and Mr. Gonzalez stated he believed the contract to potentially be in default.  I was not looking to sue but to hire this firm to send a termination letter and handle any issues regarding the contractors pushback. After waiting 11 business days I had not heard back from Mr. Gonzalez. I reached out to get a response of I have been busy at work with paying clients. ? He never called me for a retainer and I was willing to pay the retainer to hire his firm. He stated the time frames were normal for this current period of construction. I don't agree with his advice but that's alright. My issue is the fact that there was no follow-up and would not have been follow-up if I had not called. Totally unprofessional to not make a phone call or email stating it wasnt worth pursuing. What would that have taken, maybe a minute? To dismiss it as being too busy to respond and that I wasn't "a paying client" is just a cheap excuse for him not doing his job. It was worth the $300 to learn that this attorney drops the ball and doesn't handle his potential client with professionalism. If a law firm hires this type of attorney it speaks volumes of the firm as well. The saddest part is Mr. Gonzalez actually tried to justify his lack of follow-up and unprofessional lack of response and believed he was in the right. Poor service and poor attitude.
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Simpson, thanks for speaking with us about your review. reviews.text: I have now tried 5 very large cases alongside Collin, all of which were big victories on complicated cases.   Most recently, in 2020, we tried a case together in Federal Court in Little Rock, AR, which resulted in a nearly $10 million verdict on behalf of Emergency Room doctors in Arkansas.   Then, in August of this year, we went to war in Harris County against a Fortune 500 Insurance Company on behalf of Emergency Room doctors across Texas.  In that case, the result was even better, and the jury returned a verdict of $19 million.   Building upon that momentum, I asked Collin to help our trial team pick a jury in Las Vegas, NV in a case where our Emergency Room doctor clients had been grossly underpaid by the largest health insurance company in the United States.   Collin’s intuition, resourcefulness and substantial trial experience allowed us, over the course of 6 long days, to seat a jury that gave our clients a $62 million dollar verdict at the end of trial.   Whenever our firm needs co-counsel or whenever he’s available to consult with our firm’s lawyers on jury selection,  we never hesitate to call on Collin to help us deliver trial victories for our clients. – John Zavitsanos, founding partner of Ahmad, Zavitsanos, Anaipakos, Alavi & Mensing, a Chambers rated Litigation Boutique.

I cannot speak highly enough about the exceptional legal representation I received from Martinez Legal, P.C. and their outstanding attorneys, Romi Schwartz and Marci Martinez. Their professionalism, strategic insight, and deep understanding of family law made a pivotal difference in the outcome of my family court case. Thanks to their preparation and dedication, my side prevailed.

Attorney Romi Schwartz has worked closely with me and my family for over three years, guiding us through some of the most complex and emotionally challenging aspects of family law. From custody matters to working with guardians ad litem, family counselors, reunification counselors, parent facilitators, and protective orders, Romi’s expertise has been evident every step of the way. Her knowledge of the law is only matched by her compassion and unwavering commitment to justice.

Romi is truly an expert in her field and a powerful advocate who brings clarity and confidence to every legal challenge. I’m incredibly grateful for everything Martinez Legal, P.C. has done for my family and would strongly recommend their services to anyone navigating the family court system.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your thoughtful and heartfelt review. We are truly honored to have been able to assist you and your family during such important and challenging times. We remain committed to providing the highest level of care and advocacy for you and all of our clients.

reviews.text:
Yes, at-home mom for nearly 30yrs, and my journey in finding Martinez Legal P.C. started with looking through the reviews, in particular, the undesirable ones- As I do with all reviews. I was already spent and traumatized. It's divorce. There's nothing beautiful about it except, maybe, how it's handled. (Who know's, I've never done this before).
I'm ever grateful my steps led me here to attorney Romi L. Schwartz. This whole crew is magnificent. They are "life-ing" just like the rest of us but they get the job done. You really need lawyers and paralegals with integrity and I had no peace of mind until I turned my case over to them.
My God, My journey, and this covenant was not mocked because of the proper handling of it. I tried the "pro-se" route- I went as far as I could go (attempting to save from unnecessary spending). I was ignorant about this process-just like with so many things in my life and that ignorance costed me. So,My lawyer, Ms.Romi
and I came to an understanding of wich direction to go in, and the team went right to work.
Whatever was dirty about the deal (from the paperwork of her superiors to the intentions of the opposing party) "Romi-Schwartzenegger- Terminator" WAS READY! But she showed temperance and wisdom and got my case moved through the system. It "does" cost but I'm a living witness with experience here-the cost was necessary and beneficial to me. I was so glad to finally turn over this work to them. I wish I had more to give them because I know now, the work that they put in. They made my dark adventure smoother and bearable. And they should be recompensed for their commitment and diligence towards people they don't even know.
I can only "pay it forward" here. Thank you Romi- you were divinely placed in my path. Thank you Monica for your compassion and kindness. Thank you to the one who booked my appointment- I remember the hug but was too overwhelmed to remember much more. (might've been Minerva).
And to the other team members responsible for working behind the scenes ( and some in front)...Marci, Jennifer, Stephanie, Ashe from the QDRO, and anyone else I may have overlooked.
Martinez Legal P.C. is the place to come to

reviews.text:
Going through a divorce is never easy, and like many, I found myself in need of an attorney without much knowledge of where to begin. A friend recommended Marci Martinez Legal, and I ultimately worked with Jennifer Schultz, who was the lead on my case.

While some aspects of my divorce were relatively straightforward, others were deeply complex. Jennifer took the time to meet with me personally at multiple key points throughout the process, ensuring I understood my options and felt supported. She and her team, particularly Stephanie, were highly responsive, even during off-hours or while on vacation, which meant a great deal during such a turbulent time.

One aspect of Jennifer’s work that I am eternally grateful for was her help in recovering heritage jewelry that I had gifted my ex-wife during our engagement and marriage. These antique, pure gold pieces had been passed down in my family for over four generations. Under Texas law, as gifts, there was no legal recourse for me to reclaim them. Yet, through Jennifer’s exceptional legal strategy and negotiation skills, she secured special provisions in the divorce decree that allowed the jewelry to be returned.

Divorce is a messy and painful process, and often, the goal is simply to achieve the best possible outcome in a difficult situation. While no divorce ever feels like a “win,” I genuinely believe I had the best resolution I could have hoped for, given the complexity and emotional weight of my case. Jennifer was not only an incredibly competent and strategic attorney, but also a warm and sincere person who showed me compassion and grace throughout the entire process.

Thank you, Jennifer and the team at Marci Martinez Legal, for guiding me through this challenging chapter. My family and I are truly grateful for your dedication, skill, and support during such a difficult time.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thani, we sincerely and greatly appreciate your kind words.  Your words truly mean a lot to us.  Please let us know if we can ever be of future assistance.

If you are looking for a divorce attorney who is both highly skilled and genuinely cares for their clients, I wholeheartedly recommend Jennifer Schultz, or any of the women at Martinez Legal.

reviews.text: I hired them for my divorce.  I worked with them for almost 1.5 years and they didn't know that the biggest reimbursement claim I had wasn't valid until the opposing attorney educated them on the law.  Further, I got charged for responding to emails they sent me.  They make sure everyone in the office touches your file so each individual can bill you.  They are expensive and incompetent.  I spent almost $70,000 just to fire them before the final decree.  They wanted $5000 to finish the divorce. I got it done by a competent attorney for $1000.  Divorce is hard and it drains you on so many levels.  Do yourself a favor and find a competent attorney that is reasonable priced.   These ladies aren't it.  They made a bad situation even worse.

reviews.text:
Dear Jennifer and the Martinez Legal Team,

I just wanted to say thank you for everything you have done. While mediation did not prove to be ideal, you helped ensure that my youngest son will be able to continue the one activity he is enthusiastic about and that I didn't get stuck with my ex-wife's debt. It brings a lot of solace that my youngest son does have financial support to pursue his karate passion throughout his childhood if he desires to do so. While I wish she would have wanted to support our son's interest simply because it is his interest instead of using it as a bargaining tool, we got close to what she owed me in a way that protects my son and an activity that brings him joy and increased self-confidence, which is far more important to me. You also helped me understand what was and was not worth fighting based off of what our judge would likely rule. This helped me accept the situation and allowed us to reach an agreement and not drag on the divorce process another three months.

I am sure no divorce process is ever easy. I also know that family law attorneys (or attorneys in general) don't have the best reputation, but you are the type of person who should be doing what you are doing and should not be lumped in with the negative opinion of lawyers. From what I have seen you are in this profession for the right reasons and you look to do what is right within the confines of the laws and the judged you work with.

Thank you for everything! I wish you all the best.

reviews.text: CONSERVATORSHIP / POSSESSION OF TWO SEPARATE CHILDREN - My wife and I interviewed several attorneys to represent us in a matter of conservatorship for our two granddaughters. Since both girls had different fathers, the cases were separate with each posing unique challenges. Once we met with Marci Martinez, the decision of who would represent was immediately made. From the beginning, she was courteous, professional, and meticulous. She sought out all the necessary details to ensure she had a proper understanding and an effective strategy. Even with only a few days to prepare for an upcoming hearing, Marci and her team (Stephanie Elvington, Jennifer Schultz, Bonnie Sattawhite) worked diligently to represent us. Ultimately, we were able to reach an agreement thanks to the hard work and additional effort put forth by Marci and her team. They really went the extra mile. With the second case, Marci and team sweated the details, kept us informed, provided us with sound counsel, and sought our input to ensure we felt part of the process and to ensure a satisfactory solution. This case went to court, and this is where Marci showed her skills and level of comfort; she was so sharp. In the outcome, we got everything we wanted. We highly recommend Martinez Legal. Generally speaking, family law matters can be very complicated and this complexity, with the back and forth between parties and court appearances, can be quite expensive. Don’t waste your time and money on someone whose inexperience may cause things to take longer. Legal battles that go on and on can take a huge toll on you mentally, emotionally, physically, and financially; and you still may not obtain a favorable outcome. We appreciate the opportunity to write this review in hopes that it will help someone else, facing a situation similar to ours, make the right decision when it comes to selecting representation. That decision alone is the first step to a solution and the moment Marci and her team will take ownership. The immediate return will be the peace of mind knowing you have an experienced and qualified team on your side and working hard to resolve your issue. Don’t wait; book the consultation today.

I used Martinez Law firm to complete a modification to my divorce decree. As you can imagine anything that involves children is incredibly emotional. With prior firms every time I discussed my case with my lawyer it was like groundhogs day. I would have to bring them back up to speed. With Bonnie she never had to be told anything twice. I can't begin to tell you how ensuring that alone was. We got the case settled in a manner that the girls got to have their input. What a win!
Marci and her staff were very helpful. They kept us updated throughout the entire process. They were up front about their rates. We won our case and couldn't be more pleased with the result.

My divorce was long drawn out and extremely difficult. Marci, Bonnie, Stephanie and Minerva were always very patient. Explained things in detail when I had questions and guided me through the entire process. I would highly recommend Marci and her team!
Bonnie was excellent!  She spent the time and asked thorough questions to fully understand my needs.  Highly recommend!
Marci and her office staff were truly amazing. They went above and beyond and were efficient, friendly, and made our adoption process go so smoothly. I highly recommend Martinez Legal!

Martinez Legal’ s expertise and commitment to my case made me feel secure and confident during a time when much was at stake. At the beginning of my custody suit I felt overwhelmed and extremely concerned of what lay ahead. Her team recognized my apprehensions and put them to rest by answering all my questions anytime they arose. They all kept me informed of all developments in my suit and provided the necessary direction for building an amicable, mutually beneficial custody agreement. The team was super responsive and quick to always ensure I understood the process.  They kept communication flowing even during slow periods where I was waiting on timelines and paperwork.  I also felt they truly cared about my situation and advised me on what was best not just financially, but also emotionally. Marci was my main lawyer, but her entire team would be my point of contacts. Bonnie and Minerva were exceptionally detailed in understanding my case and even checked on me as the case took some turns.  I would highly recommend Martinez Legal for any Family law issue.

Marci and her staff were amazing. Marci was recommended to us by our previous attorney and was able to pick up our case and get it finalized. Marci and her staff were quick to respond to our emails and questions we had.  Marci made a stressful time much easier to get through and was there for us every step along the way. We would highly recommend Marci and her team.
