reviews.text: Brad helped me resolve an issue with the manufacturer of an electric vehicle. Brad was great to work with and I would recommend him to anyone that in a similar situation. Thanks, Brad.
I am very pleased with the Riffe Law Firm. They were very professional.

My wife and I have known Brad Rife for approximately one year, when we first contacted him to seek legal assistance regarding serious issues with our vehicle and the manufacturer. From the very beginning, Brad was professional, responsive, and completely transparent about the entire process. He immediately explained the steps involved, what documentation we would need to provide, and how the case would proceed. He also clearly explained that his legal fees would not come out of our settlement, but would instead be paid separately by the automobile manufacturer — which immediately put us at ease.

We provided Brad with all of our service records, repair history, photographs, and documentation of the repeated problems we experienced with our vehicle. He promptly notified the manufacturer of the ongoing defects and our demand to be compensated for our loss and to return the vehicle. Throughout what is naturally a time-consuming process, Brad stayed fully engaged, communicative, and proactive.

When the time came for the manufacturer to inspect our vehicle, Brad guided us through that step as well. After we experienced delays and a lack of response from the dealership, Brad did not hesitate to take the next necessary step and filed a lawsuit to move the case forward. Because the manufacturer operates under European business timelines, the process had additional challenges; however, Brad remained persistent and focused. Ultimately, he negotiated an offer that was acceptable to us. He kept us informed of where the negotiations stood, discussed the settlement range with us, and once we communicated where we would be comfortable, he resolved the matter within just a couple of weeks.

In short, Brad Rife is an outstanding attorney when it comes to dealing with automobile manufacturers and complex vehicle disputes. He is knowledgeable, persistent, and truly works on behalf of his clients. He stays on top of the case, handles matters efficiently, and ensures that his clients receive the full settlement amount, without reductions for attorney fees. The settlement we received was 100% of the agreed amount, exactly as promised.

We strongly recommend Brad Rife to anyone experiencing serious automobile issues that go beyond the dealership level and require action against a manufacturer. If you are frustrated and feel like you are getting nowhere, call Brad — he will help you. We are truly grateful for everything he did for us.

Mr Brad Riffe, was absolutely on the ball. I can only thank him for all his efforts from start to finish. Just be patient as the quality work does take time. My case involved handicapped modifications malfunctioning on my brand new van. The outcome was reasonable, thanks to Mr. Riffe.

I reached out to Brad due to transmission issues I was having with my new truck. He responded very quickly and was able to help me get some of my money back for the vehicle. I highly recommend you contact him if you are having problems with your vehicle and took to a shop 4 times or more for the same problem after getting worked on.

Brad was very knowledgeable about the lemon law process and guided me through my situation with my Wagoneer. These cases naturally take time, but he kept me updated along the way and made everything simple to execute and easy to understand. I appreciated his expertise in navigating the complexities of the case, and in the end he was able to bring it to a successful outcome. I’d recommend him to anyone needing help with lemon law issues.

I hired Attorney Brad Riffe to handle a lemon law claim against Hyundai. Early on, he admitted that Hyundai cases are “very difficult” and told me that if it had been Ford, we would have had an offer on the table already. Despite knowing the low chances of success, he took my money and provided minimal support throughout the process. Communication was poor, and I felt neglected. When I requested a refund of unearned fees, he accused me of extortion. I have filed a formal grievance with the Texas Bar. I cannot recommend his services and advise caution if you’re considering hiring him.
“Texas attorney,” “lemon law,” “Hyundai case."
reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry you had a negative experience. However, a) you did not hire me, your husband did; b) I never made any such statement regarding timelines; c) I obtained an offer for a repurchase within two months but the negative equity was too high; d) your husband opted to settle the case for cash; e) the manufacturer paid our attorney fees, not you; f) this was over a year and a half ago; and g) you have already attempted to extort money from our firm.

reviews.text: Thank you, Mr. Brad Riffe, for your invaluable assistance in my Lemon Law claim. He kept me informed and updated throughout the entire process, which resulted in a positive outcome. I highly recommend Mr. Riffe’s services and will definitely use him again if necessary.
The Riffe Law is the best ! Had an awesome experience and everything worked out great! Definitely recommend him !
Very responsive, very informative, very transparent on what to expect.  I would recommend to anyone needing representation, especially for a lemon.

The Riffe Law Firm was easy to work with and EFFECTIVE!  I only had to get him a few documents up front and he did all the work.  I ended up with a settlement that was very generous after 6 trips to the dealer for the same issue and more than 30 days of the vehicle in the shop.  Thanks Brad and team!
Mr. Riffe demonstrated great attention and care to my case during the consultation and gave me very straightforward and logical explanations. Thank you!

Mr. Riffe has been wonderful to work with! I reached out to him a few years ago over a continuous mechanical issue with one of our trucks that the warranty would no longer cover ($xx,xxx amount to fix) and after getting him the documents he needed, it was an absolute breeze of a process. We ended up having one more truck (same brand) have a similar issue more recently and he was just as helpful, informative and timely as before. Both situations came to a similar conclusion case wise and we were very happy with the outcomes. I would recommend Mr. Riffe to anyone!
Brad has represented me twice with successful results. In my experience Brad's communication skills are unparalleled among his peers.

I reached out to Brad due to transmission issues I was having with my new car.  He responded very quickly and was able to help me get my money back for the vehicle.  I highly recommend you contact him and his firm if you are having problems with your vehicle.
Brad was phenomenal from the start! Eager to have the right thing done for his clients. He made the entire process seamless.

Brad Riffe has been a great attorney in many ways - knowledgeable, thorough and professional from initial discussions to the very end.  Tough situation and he took care of all matters with excellent care.
A trustworthy lawyer

We had a lot of difficulty with our previous vehicle. We weren't even aware that there was anything we could do about the frequent issues but Mr. Riffe walked us through it. I am very satisfied with his services.

Very professional. The vehicle we bought was a mess and torture for us. We were introduced to this Law Firm and I have to say it was such an easy process. Riffe was very honest and explained exactly what would happen in the process and let us know right away if he had a case. If you need someone for a stress free lemon law issue I recommend this law firm. Seriously my deepest gratitude for this man! Thank you.

I contacted Brad about an issue that I had with my truck. The transmission was messing up and the dealership had it for a long time and even replaced the transmission two times with no resolution. I gave all my paperwork to Brad to review, and he filed a Lemon Law against the Motor Company, and I received a settlement in less than two months. If you need resolution without the headache, then Rife Law Firm is who you should call. Professional, courteous, and for the client. Thanks Brad!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words!

reviews.text: Brad did an amazing job!  I will definitely be recommending him to anyone needing his services.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you!  Your review is very much appreciated.

reviews.text: Mr. Riffe is hands down the BEST!! From the moment my friend told me how amazing he was with her case years ago, I never looked any further! He listened to my situation, comforted me with ease in explaining that he'd experienced these concerns from previous clients and took my case on immediately! The whole process was very calming. He made sure to stay in touch with me at all times about the status of the case and he assured me that he would get the issue rectified, which he did. I will recommend him to friends, family and others that are in need of a great firm for their case!1 Look NO further, Riffe Law Firm is where you should be! Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you very much!

reviews.text: Great team of professionals
Nicole is a very knowledgeable, capable,  personable and helpful lawyer. Highly recommend!

Five stars aren’t enough for this law firm. My wife and I just concluded the most stressful three years of our lives due to a botched bath remodel, Eric and Juliana stood beside us and supported us through the entire ordeal. Two trials postponed, countless hours of stress and uncertainty but we finally got the closure that they fought for and the justice we deserved. We never actually went to trial, it was settled on trial day at the courthouse with Eric’s negotiating prowess  swiftly and confidently. When the opposing counsel saw how out-gunned they were from the preparation that Eric and Juliana had done, it became clear that they had no option but to settle then and there or certainly lose the case.

God forbid we ever have to go through this again, but if we do, there is no question who we will have by our side. I highly recommend this firm!

I used this law firm for my legal matter and was represented by Phillip Herr; the entire staff is extremely professional and EXTREMELY quick to respond. Any questions I had, I got very quick responses and immediate assistance with anything I needed help with legally.
Every single person who works here is amazing—so kind and so willing to help.
Now let’s talk about Phil Herr. He is extremely professional, and I remember when I had my consultation with him. He walked into the room already having researched my legal matter and was ready to lay out every avenue I had to move forward. He is extremely well-versed in the law, and if he is your lawyer, he is going to fight for you. He lays everything out in a very understandable way. He made sure I understood the law; he is really good at translating “legal speak.” If you get Mr. Herr as a lawyer, you are truly in the best hands possible.
I really wish I could give more than 5 stars to this firm, but Google only allows 5. If I could, I would give this firm 6 stars.
Thank you, Phil, for all the help and work you did for me, and thank you to all the staff who assisted as well; every single one of you took a situation that was very stressful for me and made it so much more manageable and helped me through it.

My family and me completely 1000% recommend these lawyers to anyone who wants someone who will fight for you and your case to the very end and never give up on you or your case. We had a lot of ups and downs in our case but Juliana was very professional and compassionate and helped us to understand everything we needed to do in order to resolve our case. For what  it is worth we would use them again if we needed to but hopefully we wont

During what was undoubtedly one of the most frustrating new home purchases, Juliana Adelman proved to be an invaluable agent of support. She navigated me through deceptive trade practices, breach of contract, and fraudulent inducement with understanding and support of my situation.

Juliana was supportive in making sure I understood the options, the process and the “next steps” as we worked towards resolution of my claim. Her genuine care and empathy made a significant difference in my experience and her timely communication helped alleviate my stress in the roller coaster of discovery. I am deeply grateful for her service and recommend her to anyone facing similar circumstances.

I cannot say enough good things about Phillip Herr. He is extremely smart, kind and personable. I am very grateful for him getting my case done and as stress free as it could be considering. Just knowing he was my lawyer made the whole situation better.  Highly recommend DANKESREITER&E!

I would like to thank the staff at Dankesreiter & Emmet for all the help on my case.  Especially Phillip Herr and paralegal Lauren Jones as well as all the other office staff.  Mr. Herr was always available to answer any and all my questions throughout the entire process.  I would highly recommend this firm for any of your legal needs or questions.
Excellent experience despite the distance, highly recommended

I had used Dankesreiter & Emmet for a few different legal situations, one being with Trusts and another Civil law.  They have always been friendly, helpful, professional and timely.  Their entire office staff is great to work with and all the legal expertise has been beneficial for my needs.  I strongly recommend them for any legal needs.
Very professional and very agile in finding the fastest and most acceptable solution for us. Thank you so much for your guidance and resolution to our case.

I had a fantastic experience working with Tom and David from the beginning, along with the office personnels they demonstrated professionalism, clear communication, and a commitment to resolving challenges promptly. They were always attentive, patiently listening to every concern, and providing thoughtful guidance along the way.

What truly stood out was how they made the entire process smooth and stress-free. Their expertise and proactive approach ensured that any issues down the road were handled efficiently, giving me peace of mind.

I highly recommend DANKESREITER & EMMET office to anyone seeking reliable, knowledgeable, and supportive legal representation.

I have utilized Thomas “Tom” Emmet, Esq. services for my parents and myself with estate planning and received 5+star service. Atty. Emmet and team was very knowledgeable and personable in handling our affairs. The entire staff is very attentive and went the extra mile in handling our needs.

I am truly thankful for their outstanding service. Eric, Sean and their team have helped me solve the complicated real estate issue I had to face for over two years. I highly recommend their service without any doubt.

We had a very positive experience with our lawyer Sean Moloney regarding a dispute with our former landlord over the reimbursement of our rental security deposit.   He reviewed our case with us and assessed it was within our legal rights to get our rental deposit back.  Under his legal counsel, justice prevailed.   Sean responded to all of our email inquiries quickly and was able to achieve the desired outcome swiftly.   We are happy with the outcome and highly recommend Sean and this law firm.
We have used Dankesreiter's legal counsel for 30 years for our family business. They have always come through for us. Great people, great counsel.

Juliana Adelman was wonderful to work with. She is smart, strong, dedicated, and thorough. She resolved our issue with a result much better than we had anticipated. We are very impressed with her abilities and highly recommend her.

I am well--acquainted with Phillip Herr's work, as I have mediated several divorce and/or child custody cases with Phillip representing one side of the case.  Phillip is a passionate advocate for his client's interests, while also providing his client sound advice as to likely outcomes.  Phillip's past experience as a IV-D judge gives him unique insight and ability to prepare his clients for any issues that may arise during the process and maximize the client's results.  He is extremely knowledgeable and detail-oriented. I recommend Phillip without reservation.
Great explanation of trust program and process to set up one.

I used Mr. Herr's service for a mediation in a child visitation modification. He was thorough, expedient and professional. I have often recommended his services to others throughout the years. I would not hesitate to trust him with all my legal needs.

Mr. Dankesreiter has represented me on several business matters. He is well versed in his profession and I have complete confidence in his abilities and opinions. He is a very good guy to have on your side.
Eric and Cheramie Dankesreiter and their team did an outstanding job!  Great people, Great Company

We ran into a legal issue when trying to sell property from my dad's estate. Eric was aggressive in getting the issue resolved and the title cleared to sell. Eric and staff were great at answering questions and communicated throughout the entire process. I would 10/10 recommend this firm for any future real estate, estate, or probate cases.

The folks here are super nice and extremely thorough. I highly recommend them for any of your estate needs, especially if you plan to set up a trust for your family. Tom is patient, kind and very helpful.

Phillip Herr is by far the best lawyer in my book. He is extremely knowledgeable on all the updated Texas laws. I like the way he speaks to me where I can understand all my options. He's handled a few family law cases for me and he's my go-to-guy for all my legal needs. Thanks Phillip for having strong morals and values to get me the best possible outcome for my cases.
Eric was very responsive and thorough! It was my first time consulting with an attorney and he made it a breeze. I feel much more confident in my next steps based on his guidance.

My husband and I received exceptional legal services for estate planning from Dankesreiter & Emmet. From the very first consultation to the finalization of our estate plan, the entire experience was seamless and stress-free.

Tom Emmet demonstrates a deep understanding of estate planning laws and regulations. He took the time to listen to our unique needs and concerns, ensuring that our wishes were accurately reflected in the plan.

Throughout the process, Mr. Emmet exhibited the highest level of professionalism and courtesy. He provided clear explanations for complex legal matters. We never felt rushed, and he patiently addressed every question, ensuring we had a comprehensive understanding of each decision.

What truly stood out to us was the personalized approach taken by Dankesreiter & Emmet. They recognize that every client's situation is different and tailored the estate plan accordingly, ensuring it aligned perfectly with our specific goals and family dynamics.

Furthermore, Dankesreiter & Emmet made sure that the entire process was efficient and streamlined. They handled all the paperwork, filings, and legal formalities, saving us a significant amount of time and effort.

The entire team's friendly demeanor and genuine care for our well-being were evident throughout. Thanks to the top-notch legal services provided by Mr. Emmet, we now have the peace of mind that our family’s future is secure and my wishes will be carried out as intended.

I was referred to Dankesreiter & Emmet for assistance with a contested estate.  Eric saw me right away, and he, Juliana and their team worked tirelessly on my case, ultimately bringing it to a successful conclusion.  I cannot recommend them highly enough.  This is the firm you want in your corner!
We used Dankesreiter and Emmet for our estate planning and they made the process so easy. Definitely 5 stars!
Staff is extremely professional, warm and friendly.  Comprehensive guidance and very quick service.  We have been clients for almost 20 years and will continue to be for many years to come.

Even thou they seemed nice. I called to ask whether I have a case or not to move forward. Instead of just being up front from beginning and saying no. They asked for all documents and charged me on top of that and then told me there really is nothing that can be .
Overcharging with no legal advice. Totally non-value-added time.

Had a very good experience with Eric and the team. In a legal situation that was stressful and frightening for someone with no prior legal experience like myself, it was an incredible relief to experience being fought for every step of the way by a team that truly cares. Cannot recommend enough.
Great service and effective strategies.

I got a call back fairly quickly.  $260.00 an hour for a phone call/meeting (I only spoke with the receptionist).  Not sure how much other attorneys cost, but Rocket Lawyer is much cheaper and served my purposes well.

I highly recommend Phillip Herr and the Dankestreiter team.  They handled my case quickly, and guided me through the process. I felt educated and supported and will use them for my future legal needs.

Our project was with Tom Emmet, esq, and his assistants Denise and Candy. What a great team and wonderful experience. Attention to details. Very professional process. Timely and accurate execution. Highly recommended indeed.

Given my profession (international oil business), I have had to deal with law firms throughout my business life, and in various regions of the globe.

Having the possibility of choosing from many high quality firms anywhere in the USA, my wife and I chose to deal with Danksreiter and Emmet for various personal and corporate issues.  We both could not be happier w/the top quality of their work, and w/the kind, courteous and respectful treatment received from everyone at this great firm.

Both my wife and I can, without any hesitation, recommend both Eric Dankesreiter and Thomas Emmet, the founding members, to everyone. And particularly, their paralegals and other attorneys are absolutely wonderful with whom to deal.

Thank you all and well done!
Would not recommend this place. ERIC DANKESREITER IS A REAP OFF. HE WILL BILL U 35,000 IN FEES. WHEN U WIN THE CASE HE GETS ALL THE MONEY. STRAIGHT JOKE. BE VERY CAREFUL DEALING WITH THIS FRIM..

It was a real pleasure having Ericka Sessum and this team of legal professionals help us to maneuver through a real estate transaction. We were provided information to keep us current, courtesy as we went through our unfamiliarity and fast professional services. Sometimes things moved almost lightening fast. I strongly recommend them to anyone seeking legal assistance. We are thankful for them and appreciate their hard work and professionalism.

Phillip Herr was very helpful with my divorce modification. He walked me through the process and advised me on what would be best for me and my family. He was there to answer any and all questions that I had and was very helpful throughout the process. I would highly recommend Phillip to anyone who has family law needs!

We had a serious issue after purchasing our home that was not disclosed to us. I reached out to Eric initially just to see if I had a case. He was encouraging. Later I reached out and Anthony Brown handled the case. He was in touch frequently, professional, listened and knew what we needed. I have a friend who recently hired an attorney and call after call doesn’t hear back. Not the case for me! Things moved quickly and we reached a settlement. This firm and Anthony made me feel as though my concerns were just as important to them.

Phillip Herr, and his paralegal, Stephanie, are outstanding!  I was referred to Mr. Herr by a co-worker and I'm so glad that I was.  At the beginning of my decision to divorce my husband, I thought we would see eye-to-eye.  I was so wrong about that!  The moment I met Mr. Herr, I knew he would fight for me.  At one point, I was ready to give in... tired of the struggle, but Mr. Herr encouraged me to hang in there.  In the end, I got what was rightfully mine.  Thank you both for you attention to my case, your professionalism, your kindness and your desire to work hard for others.
Best firm I could have hired!  Very professional, they spoke in laymen's terms, instead of Attorney terms. Which was very refreshing.  I will absolutely call them back if I need another attorney!

Having to deal with legal issues can be monumental on top of taxing and stressful. To find a law firm that will treat you like family from the moment you enter their office is paramount in easing the tension as you go through the process of dealing with a legal issue.
This law firm has been the best relationship I’ve had as far as legal counsel is concerned. They have been there for me through thick and thin. The best thing I love about them is they understand my legal needs whenever I reach out to them. When you find a legal firm that understands you and meet you at your point of need hold onto them keep them real close. If you’re looking for a law firm that has your best interest at heart this is the law firm for you. Love you guys and may your law firm be blessed and highly favored.

I’m so glad I took the time to do my research and found such a phenomenal attorney. She truly cares about her clients and goes above and beyond to support them. I would absolutely recommend her every time! ❤️

I'd like to take a moment to share my experience with Suzanne Stevens. I am so incredibly grateful to her and the way she handled my case from start to finish. Suzanne is a spectacular attorney! she is very professional and knowledgeable in everything she does. I am so thankful to her because, even though my case was difficult, she knew how to handle it in the best way possible, always looking out for my well-being. She was with me throughout the entire process and never left me alone in any court. Now I don't have to worry about any more court appearances! She took care of everything. I will always recommend her because I know you will be in very good hands. Thank you so much for everything! I always have you present in my heart.

She is one of the smartest, most empathetic, high energy humans I’ve ever met.  She’s not only the best attorney on the planet earth she’s also a role model and a mentor.  Although I’m not proud of the situation I got in to lead me to Suzanne, I’m thankful that it happened because she has already had a massive impact on my life, mental health and future goals and plans.  You won’t find a better attorney even if you had unlimited money, I promise.

The Best Attorney I have ever worked with. I think she is the best in the world. She is different and very understanding. She gets to know you personally and will make you work, just as hard as she is. The outcome will show. She is worth every penny and I will recommend her to anyone.
Suzanne is a true professional in every sense of the word and took care of me and my case.

Suzzane is the BEST lawyer. Will always guide you through every aspect that you could think of and won’t leave you hanging high and dry. She was amazing in explaining the letter of the law to me in laymen terms that even I could understand. Will always recommend her to anyone that is looking for the best lawyer in Texas.

A year ago, I received a call that no Mom wants to recieve. My youngest son was in jail in Denton Tx while attending college and I was living in Austin.  My heart was broken and I couldn't think straight.  I googled attorneys in Denton and Suzanne Stevens name came up.  She had 5 star reviews from everyone.  I looked at other attorneys but something kept pulling me back to her name, so I called the number.  To my amazement, SHE actually answered her phone (not a receptionist)!!  Through my tears, I explained what I knew about his arrest.  She gave me the name of a bondsman and told me to tell him that Suzanne Stevens told me to call him. Then she said, "You have my number. Call me if you have any more questions or need me to represent him".  I drove that night to Denton and called her after reading his bond conditions which said he couldn't leave Denton Co.  Within 3 business days of retaining her, she had my son's bond conditions amended so I could take him home.  Suzanne gave me one price.  She said "no hidden fees", and she meant that!  She is the most kindest, thoughtful, straight forward person you'll ever meet and she goes  above and beyond to help you!  She is so knowledgeable about the law and because of her creativity and diligence, she helped my son get into the PTD program for his case. He ended up going back to college and graduated with his Bachelor's in May!  Without her help, he wouldn't have had that opportunity.  I am SO GRATEFUL to her and she has truly been a GOD sent!  Thank you will never be enough!  I am forever grateful to her.  No Mama wants to get that call, but if you ever do, you want SUZANNE on your side.

The best lawyer, hands-down, No words can express how grateful I am for Suzanne. She made sure to explain to me how my case would play out and what she was going to do and she did just that I highly recommend her. She’s the best.

Suzanne, no words can truly say or express the gratitude i have for your help. Highly recommend, she made sure to explain to me hoe my case would play out, and helped me through the worst time in my life. She took care of everything for me and helped me focus on what I needed to focus on. She delivered on everything she said she would. 10 out 10.

I reached out to Suzanne in search of legal advice and she called me back on the phone almost immediately afterwards. She spoke with me for a while, offering me help in a very transparent, honest manner. Although I did not end up needing her formal services, she was clear about pricing if I did choose to use her services. (She did not give me an arbitrary range of how much it MIGHT cost me—instead she gave a firm price and did not sugarcoat anything, which I really appreciated). She said that she will never make a client pay unnecessarily for her services if there are other possible options for a client to get something done effectively without a lawyer, which was appreciated.  She guided me on how to go about resolving a situation on my own and reassured me. I would definitely recommend reaching out to Suzanne if you ever need legal services or advice. I have her phone number saved in case I may ever need her help again.

Suzanne has been an incredible attorney to me throughout a very stressful time period in my life. I came across her in a facebook group and am so happy I took the time to look her up. She is thorough in her course of action, always available to answer any questions you may have, and keeps you updated on exactly what is happening with your case. She has been encouraging, a friend, and a mentor to me since we first spoke back in March. Suzanne works diligently, is extremely knowledgeable about the court system, and ultimately got the end result of my case being dismissed! I was not feeling very hopeful at the beginning of this but she continued to remain optimistic and positive when we spoke. I will FOREVER be grateful for the effort she has put in to achieving this outcome for me, and for the things she has taught me throughout the process that I will carry with me for years. To say she is a blessing would be an understatement. Thank you Suzanne. For everything!

Suzanne is an amazing lawyer.  She listens attentively to understand from your perspective.  She is very knowledgeable about the court system to the point of having you be prepared with resources to help your court appearances be less daunting.  She will do everything in her power so you can come out with the best possible outcome.

Suzanne is truly a life saver, she truly cares about her clients and wants what’s best for them. She’ll work hard for you to get the best outcome. She’ll stand beside you and fight for you. I don’t know if you could find a better lawyer!

Suzanne came recommended by a person in a Facebook group. It was happenstance and the perfect one. She has worked diligently for a loved one and with a great outcome. And her support, guidance and eternally positive outlook has been a pillar of strength. If you are a well- intentioned client, you’ll see that  she continues to offer her presence and friendship beyond what the service demands. Well beyond that of an attorney. She’s a wonderful human with a conscience and  a spiritual, philosophical outlook on life. How many attorneys can you say that about? Thank you, Suzanne, for everything.
I am thankful for Suzanne Stevens for working on my case. She did an amazing job on both of my cases.

I will highly recomend the great experience and top of the line representstion of this super lawyer to take care of your case in Denton, Tx area, she makes you feel like a family member no doubt about it, very professional and she is always available when contacting her to follow up your case in progress may the Lord Jesus keep her safe .
Suzanne Stevens did more than just right a wrong and more than bring justice to a system that unjustly gripped me. I’d recommend her to any good folk that knows they are in a bind. She will care.

I have nothing but great things to say about her and I would recommend her to anybody that ever needs any type of legal representation. If you are looking for a lawyer to go over and beyond for you and fight for you until the very end then Suzanne is definitely the one!

Suzanne Stevens and her team are top priority! Amazing Lawyer, she took up my case even had advised me on ways I could effectively handle my case successfully if I wasn't able to offered a lawyer. She went above and beyond representing me and I'm truly grateful to have found her to be my lawyer

Oh my god how great Suzanne, called to get info to hire the firm she helped me without even feel like it’s all about money or anything else she gave me the info I needed for a case and I will call her after the holidays and I will hire her . Wow what a great person

She is "real people," that showed understanding and empathy.  If me or my children ever found ourselves in a situation again,  I'd have no hesitation about hiring her to represent my family.

Thank you Suzanne.

Thank you so very much, Suzanne, lawyers like you are truly a blessing . 🥰
Suzanne is a better person than she is a lawyer, and she’s a darn good lawyer.  She truly cares for her clients and I fully recommend her to anyone.  I’d give more stars if I could!

Suzzanne Stevens too not only as a blessing and a friend but also as a professional attorney who puts her client first.

Excellent lawyer, mother, and human being. I highly highly reccomend Ms. Stevens. If you need a lawyer specializing in criminal defense look no further. This is a person that you can really trust to fight for you and win! She's one of the best lawyers in Texas! Give her a call she can help you.

No one wants to be in the position to need this type of lawyer, but when you do, you want the best. Suzanne went above and beyond to assist my family in this time and definitely thankful to have her on our side.

You can feel her investment in every deal, and that’s rare. She’s also just a genuinely kind, personable human, which makes even the most stressful transactions more manageable.

We truly consider Fon an extension of our team, because honestly, we couldn’t do what we do without her. She’s honest, ethical, and always has our best interest at heart. And her team? Top notch. Friendly, fast, and just as dialed in as she is.

If you’re looking for someone who knows their stuff inside and out and makes your life easier in the process, Fon is it.

Full Disclosure:  Although I am the one writing the review, I was not the actual client going through the divorce.  I'm the really good friend who was there for moral support every step of the way and I'm the one who found an attorney when it became obvious that my friend needed one.   Goline Rowland Law Firm, specifically Rachel Roland, came highly recommended from a personal friend of ours.  Which was a blessing because the drawn out divorce process had already  become contentious and intimidating.  He hired Rachel and was so glad he did - we both were.  It's not just typing up a decree, it's also navigating all of the paperwork with the court, prodding the "contentious other party" to "please respond", and then accurately interpreting the best wording in the decree for what he was trying to accomplish while being mindful of the many pitfalls we didn't even know might exist.  Long story short, my friend definitely needed the services of an attorney and he was lucky to have found Rachel  as well as her amazing paralegal Alisha Morgan.  The whole process took a few months but they were always on the ball and mindful of deadlines.  Ultimately the "contentious other party" signed the papers, nobody had to appear before the judge and my friend is now officially divorced.    Not everybody needs a divorce attorney, but if you do we definitely recommend Rachel and Alisha at Goline Roland Law Firm.  They were awesome!!!

Best law firm I have dealt with. Greg and Ashley are very knowledgeable, professional, and kind.
If you are in a situation you need them for,  I highly recommend.

And Alisha? She is a force. Her responsiveness, organization, and attention to every single detail gave me so much peace of mind. She stayed on top of everything, communicated clearly, and made me feel like I wasn’t walking through any of this alone. The two of them together are truly the dream team.

What stood out most was how much they cared—not just about the outcome, but about me as a person. I never felt dismissed, rushed, or like just another case file. They listened, they believed me, and they fought for me with integrity and heart.

If you’re looking for a legal team that is fierce, knowledgeable, trustworthy, and genuinely invested in your wellbeing, you will not find better than Theresa and Alisha. I am forever grateful for them and would recommend them a thousand times over.
